  • Powered By

    • Perhaps the most underrated revolutionary power you possess is to inspect, reconsider, and possibly upgrade your own personal Thoughtware.

      Why is this revolutionary?

      Because the human morphogenetic field combines all human thoughtware. Submitting yourself to Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) changes nothing. But Upgrading even one piece of your Thoughtware stands out in a dark sky like a shining golden star which others can more easily notice and explore. One person Upgrading one piece of Thoughtware skews the entire average into new dimensions. But here, on this website, we offer you 50 outstanding Thoughtware Upgrades from Archiarchy - a new regenerative culture emerging on Earth! Here you get Thoughtware you can apply in your daily life to see immediate new results. Your High Level Fun multiplies when you invite others to go on this Thoughtware Upgrade adventure together with you during a weekly online or offline Possibility Team. Here are enough Thoughtware Upgrade Experiments for one entire year of exciting Possibility Team meetings.

    • Whatever Thoughtware Upgrade you can do,

      begin it!

      Transformation has Possibility, Agency,

      and Magic in it.

      - Clinton Callahan

    • What Is Thoughtware?

       

      Thoughtware is what you use to think with.

      Not what you think about, but the frameworks or logic-set you use to think about what you think about. That's Thoughtware.

      We don't learn about Thoughtware in school. In school, they taught you what to think about - facts, concepts, formulas, dates, names - but not what to think with. You needed to already know how to think before they would let you into school.

      So, where did you learn to think? (From your parents.)

      And, where did your parents learn to think? (From their parents, and so on.)

      This means you are using Thoughtware that has been passed down from generation to generation for perhaps thousands of years. You are using Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.).

      So are most people in the Capitalist Patriarchal Empire of modern culture.

      New versions of Thoughtware are available. If you want, you can upgrade your Thoughtware.

      How often do you upgrade the software in your phone? (As often as they announce that new upgrades are available, even once a month.)

      But upgrading your phone software is a bother. Why do you do it? (To get the new features.)

      These same considerations apply to Upgrading your own personal human Thoughtware.

      Your Thoughtware is what formulates the ways in which you can interact with the world. Your Possibilities, inhibitions, limitations, relationships, and abilities for creating outcomes are all determined by your Thoughtware.

      One would think it would be common knowledge how valuable it is to examine one's Thoughtware. But Thoughtware introspection is not a class taught in modern schooling. Nonetheless, Thoughtware introspection is a central theme in Archiarchy. It is part central to Self Observation, and Noticing.

      Possibility Management is 'Thoughtware for Archiarchy' because Possibility Managment originates in the same Context as Archiarchy, namely the Context of Authentic Adulthood Initiatory Processes, Radical Responsibility, Nonmaterial Value, Clarity, Love, Empowerment, and Possibility.

      When someone draws Thoughtware as an illustration or an energetic flow map, it becomes a 'Thoughtmap'.

      The website PM Thoughtmaps shows some of the rapidly emerging new Thoughtmaps from Possibility Management which are used in Archiarchy.

    • Thoughtware Upgrades in process...

      Looks fun and exciting, doesn't it?

    • What Is A Thoughtware Upgrade?

      No one can upgrade your Thoughtware for you.

      More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your own Thoughtware!

      Your mind is yours to play with and make into whatever you want.

      Think of the original flatworld Thoughtmap. There it is, a disk with water falling off its edges into infinite space. If you sail away from known territory on your flatworld map, you fall off the edge of the world and die. Scary thought... Makes you want to stay at home, eh?

      But before the flatworld Thoughtmap, there was no Thoughtmap at all. Having the flatworld Thoughtmap gave us the power to locate the good guys, the bad guys, the treasure... Those first Thoughtmaps were very useful.

      Then think about what happened five-hundred years ago when someone proposed a new round-world Thoughtmap.

      What happened to those new mapmakers? (They were killed or put in prison.)

      Why? (Because their new Thoughtmaps upset the existing power structures. The psychopaths who had clawed their way to the top of the hierarchy were afraid of losing their positions.)

      Nowadays, the idea of Upgrading Thoughtware has become easier to imagine due to our smart phones and laptops. We upgrade operating systems as soon as the new features are available, hardly even thinking about the consequences.

      Imagine upgrading the Operating System of your phone. When you start the Upgrade, your whole phone shuts down. The old Operating System is erased or is being rearranged for a few moments while you wait in the dark. In this time, your phone is in a Liquid State.

      Your phone's Liquid State is a close approximation to a human Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State. The difference is that when upgrading your personal Thoughtware, you experience the Liquid State from the inside. It could be uncomfortable for a few moments in any of your 5 Bodies.

      The ideas you adopted during your childhood as your Survival Strategy worked just fine for you (or we would not be having this conversation now...). However, childhood Survival Strategies are not necessarily the optimal Thoughtware to use for trying to live in the world as an adult... perhaps you have noticed this already?

      The questions then arise:

      • What other Thoughtware is available for you to use?
      • How exactly does one go about Upgrading your personal Thoughtware?

      Excellent questions!

      Conditions for successful Personal Thoughtware Upgrade include:

      • You are in a 3 Cell or a Possibility Team that meets regularly to support each other's Transformation and Thoughtware Upgrades.
      • You have good physical health from being Centered, Grounded, and Bubbled so that you can ride through the Personal Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid States.
      • You have sound mental / psycho-emotional fitness for exploring beyond the edges of the known world of your Box and Comfort Zone.
      • You have developed significant competence with Inner Navigating your Feelings and Emotions.
      • You have enough Radical Simplicity and free Attention from relocating your Presence to a Minimized Now.
      • You have a Transformed Gremlin and Decontaminated Adult Egostate to implement your Integrity, your Commitments and Your Word.
      • You have strong Clarity about your Old Thoughtware through Self Observation and Feedback from your Teams.
      • You have strong Clarity about new possible forms of Thoughtware which you understand and are inspired to try.
      • You are in a held Process Space in which to experience the Liquid States of grieving how much time you spent using the old Thoughtware and what that cost you in terms of intimacy and Possibility.
      • You are in a held Experiment Space in which you try bit-at-a-time or all-at-once to implement the new Thoughtware.

      Sometimes you can upgrade a piece of old Thoughtware by reading certain Thoughtware Upgrade Articles or Thoughtware Upgrade Books, watching certain Thoughtware Upgrade Videos, participating in a Thoughtware Upgrade WorkTalk, Thoughtware Upgrade Workshop, or Thoughtware Upgrade Training such as Expand The Box.

      Sometimes you can upgrade a piece of old Thoughtware through an Emotional Healing Process (EHP), or Possibility Coaching, or a Feelings Practitioner Clinic.

      Sometimes you can upgrade a piece of old Thoughtware reflexively, that is, by experiencing a new piece of Thoughtware become operational in the place where some old Thoughtware is fading away simply due to having built enough of the right kind of Matrix in your Being that the Thoughtware Upgrade happens all by itself, without any conscious effort on your part.

      We recommend using all of the above options for your Thoughtware Upgrading needs...

      And right here on this website, we offer you 50 Thoughtware Upgrade Experiments to Archiarchy! You could become an Experimenter and try these!

    • Increasing Brain Health

      Trying to upgrade your thoughtware when your brain health is diminished by traumatic stress symptoms and a shrinking hippocampus is self-defeating. Michael Nehls shares his research on how to fertilize your brain to produce increased curiosity, courage, and rational compassion. He shows how a balanced regime including aquatic omega-3 fatty acids, vitamin D3, and low doses of essential Lithium (1 mg Lithium daily in the form of Lithium-orotate, or in a liter of Hirschquelle Heilwasser natural mineral water from Germany) nurtures 'adult hippocampal neurogenesis'. This means, you grow new 'index neurons' in your hippocampus - the source of your 'autobiographical memory'. In other words, you expand who you perceive yourself to be. This gives you the psychological resilience to reassess your thinking, the flexibility to change your mind, the agency to explore new possibilities, and the power to upgrade your thoughtware!

      Michael Nehls' Website

    • Supplements for promoting adult hippocampal neurogenesis.

    • It is clear that the world is in flux. But amidst this turbulence, new ways of thinking, living, and being are sprouting like seeds pushing up through the pavement.

      This emergence is not just a possibility; it’s a necessity. This is the natural, unstoppable force of life demanding to be nurtured. And it’s not something we can sit back and watch from the sidelines. It’s an invitation to actively participate in the creation of something unprecedented - a world where creativity, connection, and compassion are the guiding principles.

      As the old fades away, the new is ready to take root. This is our moment to shape the future we want to see, to plant the seeds of a world where everyone thrives. Let’s nurture it together.

      - Jon Symes pachamama.org, jonsymes.com

    • What Is Thoughtware Upgrade To Archiarchy?

      A new regenerative culture is emerging around the world.

      Don't be left behind playing in a stupid gameworld.

      After studying the above two sections titled: Thoughtware, and Thoughtware Upgrade... only one question remains. What is Thoughtware Upgrade To Archiarchy?

      Modern culture teaches Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware which is designed to create the Capitalist Patriarchal Empire that rules over modern culture inhabitants creating the ecocidal outcomes of modern culture.

      There are, of course, many kinds of Thoughtware Upgrades in which you could engage. For example:

      • You could create Thoughtware that justifies a penal system that puts offenders in self-contained underground bunkers until they die.
      • You could create Thoughtware for approving only Genetically Modified Organisms as fit for human consumption.
      • You could create Thoughtware for a society that values citizens over the age of 70 years and only if they have one million Euros in their personal bank accounts, and everyone else are their servants providing food, shelter, comforts and conveniences.
      • Etc.

      Out of all possible Thoughtware Upgrades that could be made, some of them generate the regenerative initiation-centered nonmaterial-value radically-responsible culture of Archiarchy. For example:

      • You could co-create a new legal system that functions according to the set of values and distinctions outlined in a Bill Of Wrongs.
      • You could deduce new kinds of logic for making life choices that serve your Bright Principles and your Archetypal Lineage rather than popular concepts such as 'success' or 'profit'.
      • You could establish new Thoughtware in the Rules Of Engagement of a secret Hogwarts-style University that not only provides 5-Body Healing and Authentic Adulthood Initiatory Processes, but also trains Gameworld Builders to create more secret Hogwarts-style Universities.
      • And so on.

      The point is that if you make more than a few personal Thoughtware Upgrades to Archiarchy, you are no longer able to live in the Capitalist Patriarchal Empire of modern culture. You don't fit in anymore. Patriarchy won't make sense to you anymore. It will become too painful for you to continue implementing the Thoughware and traditions of modern culture.

      Some of you have been looking forward to making Thoughtware Upgrades to Archiarchy your whole life. You cannot wait to take the next steps! Hallejulah brothers and sisters!

      Others of you can't believe anyone would ever want to participate in anything other than the modern Capitalist Patriarchal Empire with its clever economic loopholes used for capturing the United States Supreme Court and the law-making machinery to promote war and reduce corporate restrictions. What could be more fun than hiding away another billion in U.S. or Singaporean tax havens?

      "De gustibus non disputandem est," is Latin which roughly translates as, "There ain't no arguin' about tastes."

      If you choose to continue Upgrading your Thoughtware to Archiarchy... here you are!

      If not, please exit this website now...

      THE PROCESS OF UPGRADING YOUR THOUGHTWARE

      The process of Upgrading your Thoughtware is cumulative but not linear.

      What this means is that Upgrading your Thoughtware is not like:

      1 + 1 + 1 + 1 + 1 = 5

      Upgrading Thoughtware is cumulative, Unreasonable, and Nonlinear. It goes more like:

      Elephants + 42 + Dust Balls + Beehoven's 7th + Technopenuriaphobia = a person able to source an expanded Context.

      This is why Archiarchy Invention Centers are not organized into a logical or standardized curriculum. There is no 'right' order. Looking around to follow a 'correct procedure' is being Adaptive to some imagined external Authority figure. Trying to 'follow the curriculum' indicates that a childhood Survival Strategy is determining your life.

      50 Thoughtware Upgrades to Archiarchy is 'childhood's end'.

      This means on the one hand, your Survival Strategy no longer has value, because instead of protecting you, it has now become your prison.

      On the other hand, you are designed for this radical transition out of childhood/adolescence and into Authentic Initiated Adulthood. Each Thoughtware Upgrade is a further Initiation into Adulthood and into your destiny. This is the Path.

      Each person's Path is different. The specific thing you personally need to learn next is unique, and waiting directly in front of your nose.

      Go figure it out!

      No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you.

      More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your own thoughtware!

    • Go figure it out yourself !

      Because no one else can figure it out for you.

    • 50 Thoughtware Upgrades To Archiarchy

      By thinking about what you are thinking with,

      you can discover what you were not aware that you were not aware of.

      When you consciously install new thoughtware to think with,

      you start thinking new things in new territories,

      possibly things you never imagined could be thought.

      This makes you an Experimenter.

      By making all 50 of these Thoughtware Upgrades you will become Archan.

      Said in reverse: By ignoring even one of these 50 Thoughtware Upgrades, you are defending

      Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) for some particular reason...

      If you can find your particular reason, you have just discovered a Doorway to your next Emotional Healing Process (EHP).

      NOTE 1: In the Thoughtware Activation Experiments below, the original suggested time for Practice is one week. In Radical Reality, the Practices never end. Instead they are cumulative. In other words, once you start a Practice it becomes part of who you are in the world. One week is not enough time to activate and integrate new Thoughtware, especially Thoughtware with as much impact as these 50 Thoughtware Upgrades to Archiarchy.

      On the other hand, try not to get fanatical or you could end up stressing yourself out trying to perfectly match a Fantasy World, and then collapsing into your 'I'm never going to make it,' Swamp. (See the Radical Reality website for more on this ping-pong pattern...) You have already built certain kinds of Matrix in your Being in order to be reading these words or starting into your 50 Thoughtware Upgrades. No two people have identical Matrix, so some of the following Experiments will seem natural and easy for you, while others will seem incredibly inconceivable. We recommend engaging with your 50 Thoughtware Upgrade Experiments for a whole year in your weekly Possibility Team. There you will receive plenty of support and camaraderie, enough to open up whole new shared worlds to explore.

      NOTE 2: Often times the Thoughtware Upgrade descriptions below ask you to write and publish an Article or a Short Story, or to give a WorkTalk or a WorkShop. Yes, we realize you were sent to school. Yes, we realize that at school you learned to fear and hate writing, or speaking in public. And... yes, part of this Thoughtware Upgrade Process is to do things you might unconsciously fear and hate. Why? Because, what if you can write? What if you can speak to people? The old Archan saying is: "If you can talk, you can write Articles and Books. If you can talk, you can give WorkTalks and WorkShops." We need your writing out in the world now more than ever before, sharing your observations, discoveries, and experiences. Why? Because Archiarchy is huge, multidimensional, and dynamic. It cannot come from a few people. It comes from every Archan. The more you write about discovering and co-creating Archan Thoughtware Upgrades, the more you change the morphogenetic field of the human race. By publishing your Articles and WorkTalks, you change the status quo more powerfully than any other way.

      NOTE 3: Please remember, 'S.H.I.T.' is merely an acronym for Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware.

      #1 S.H.I.T. ABOUT YOUR ATTENTION IS THAT CORPORATE MARKETERS SECRETLY TRY TO STEAL IT, FORCING YOU TO HAVE A SHORTER AND SHORTER ATTENTION SPAN. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS YOU CAN CONSCIOUSLY PLACE YOUR ATTENTION WHERE YOU WANT IT TO BE, AND ALSO NOT PLACE YOUR ATTENTION WHERE YOU DO NOT WANT IT TO BE, WHICH HELPS YOU CONSERVE ENOUGH ENERGY TO CAUSE WHAT YOU WANT TO CAUSE.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.01

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, answer the following questions in your Beep! Book. (NOTE: There are no 'wrong' or 'right' answers to these questions. The purpose of these questions is so that you benefit from seeing possible new angles for your Self Observation.)

      • What happens when you put your Attention on something? (a sound, color, shape, smell, taste, temperature, vibration?)
      • What sorts of things do you mostly Notice in your daily life?
      • How do you place your Attention on something?
      • How do you Notice what you Notice?
      • What stops you from Noticing what you don't Notice?
      • What stops you from Noticing what you Notice?
      • What prevents you from putting your Attention on something? Is it a thought? A fear? A rule?
      • When do you put your Attention on your thoughts?
      • What stops you from thinking about certain things? What are the 'dark forbidden subjects' for you?
      • How often do you put your Attention on your Feelings?
      • What do you feel about your Attention?
      • How often do you put your Attention on other people's Feelings?

      We have discovered that your consciousness (your awareness...) goes where you put your Attention, and your energy follows your awareness.

      What this means is that, where you Attention goes, your energy flows.

      Human awareness is one of the most precious and delicious substances in the Universe. Why else would corporations spend billions a year trying to get your Attention? If they can get your Attention, then they can get your wallet... You are paying for all that advertising!

      What percentage of your energy have you been wasting by letting your Attention wander aimlessly, meaning under the control of external forces?

      PART 2: You can consciously place your Attention wherever 'you' want using your Conscious Will. For how long can you keep your Attention in one place? For most people is is less than 7 seconds. Pair up and clock yourself. One person keep Point Attention, say, on the second hand of a clock. The other person Hold Space and confirm the measurement.

      The question is, which 'I' (identity) is doing the wanting? Which of your 'Parts' is in charge at the moment, directing your Will? But we will get to that later...

      This Experiment is to develop enough Noticing muscles to Consciously Notice where you are placing your Attention and what you are creating by placing it there.

      Use your Beep! Book to record what you Notice about where you place your Attention. Start a new page in your Beep! Book titled, MY ATTENTION, then answer the following questions.

      • If you place your Attention on an advertisement, what happens?
      • If you place your Attention on a particular part of someone's anatomy, what happens?
      • If you refuse to look someone in the eyes, what happens?
      • When someone looks at you because you looked at them, how did that happen?
      • Who in your Possibility Team has more status? Who has more power?

      PART 3: For the next 7 days, DO NOT unconsciously place your Attention ANYWHERE, because then you will be flowing your energy there to feed an Unconscious Purpose...

      Okay, well then... DO NOT unconsciously place your Attention ANYWHERE for 7 hours...

      Ahh, okay... well then, DO NOT unconsciously place your Attention ANYWHERE for 7 minutes.

      Hmmm... I see how bad it is... So then, well... Try this now in your Possibility Team: DO NOT unconscious place your Attention ANYWHERE for a full 7 seconds.

      See if you can do that. 7 full seconds! Time yourelf. Make efforts to consciously extend the length of your badly shortened Attention span. Build your Attention muscles.

      Practice this 25 times each day for this whole week: Not unconsciously placing your Attention ANYWHERE for a full 7 seconds.

      Learn to sense when something outside of you wants to get your Attention (write it down in your Beep! Book exactly what tries to get your attention and how it does this), and when something inside of you wants to put your Attention somewhere (write it down in your Beep! Book exactly what tries to put your attention somewhere and how it does this). Do not place Your Attention anywhere unless you Consciously Choose to place it there. Whose Attention is it, anyway?

      After NOT placing your Attention anywhere for 7 seconds for 25 times in one day for 7 days in a row, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.01 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 21 Matrix Points.

      #2 S.H.I.T. SAYS YOU HAVE A BODY THAT CARRIES YOUR MIND AROUND TO THE NEXT MEETING SO IT CAN BE ENTERTAINED. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS YOUR BEING INHABITS 5 BODIES: PHYSICAL, INTELLECTUAL, EMOTIONAL, ENERGETIC, AND ARCHETYPAL, EACH ONE REQUIRING SPECIFIC CARE AND OFFERING YOU SPECIFIC RESOURCES.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.02

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding your 5 Bodies by reading through the 5-Bodies website.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other, "I used to think that I had only a physical body and a mind."

      PART 2: Take turns and say something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State. I am Noticing that I have 5-Bodies:

      1. My Physical Body has organs to detect Experiential sensations.
      2. My Intellectual Body has a mind with opinions, stories, sensations and Attention.
      3. My Emotional Body has a heart with both Feelings and Emotions.
      4. My Energetic Body senses the existence and purpose of spaces, status, timing, elegance, and ownership.
      5. My Archetypal Body allows me to access Infinite Resources such as Bright Principles and my Archetypal Lineage, and to explore in the Archetypal Domains."

      Then write down whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware by doing the following Experiment at your next Possibility Team meeting. Work in groups of 3 sitting in chairs, with a Possibilitator, a Client, and a Coach. The Possibilitator makes a 5 Body Check-In with the Client. The Possibilitator lets each of their 5-Bodies report to the other person how it is going, what it is Noticing, and what it wants next. The Client repeats back what they heard you say, using a Completion Loop. Go for 7 minutes per person, then change roles until each person has made the Check-In.

      Then make new groups of 3 and start over. Notice what you learn about how to make a 5 Body Check-In by experiencing other people's 5 Body Check-Ins. And notice how different things show up in you to Check-In about when you Check-In with various different people.

      PART 4: Once each day for the next 7 days, arrange to exchange a 5 Body Check-In Conversation with another Archan, either online or in person.

      After exchanging a 5 Body Check-In with someone once a day for 7 days, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.02 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #3 S.H.I.T. SAYS THERE IS ONE TRUE AND RIGHT 'KNOWLEDGE CONTINENT' AND ANYTHING THAT DOES NOT FIT ONTO THAT KNOWLEDGE CONTINENT IS WORTHLESS. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS YOU CAN SHIFT OUT OF 'DEFENSIVE LEARNING' - AS TAUGHT IN SCHOOL - AND RECLAIM THE 'EXPANSIVE LEARNING' SKILLS YOU DEVELOPED BEFORE SCHOOL, SO YOU CAN SIMULTANEOUSLY USE MANY 'KNOWLEDGE CONTINENTS' IN PARALLEL.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.03

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) specifically regarding 'Defensive Learning' and 'Expansive Learning' by reading out loud and and doing Experiments in the Expansive Learning website.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"I used to think that I am a good learner by defending my one Knowledge Continent."

      PART 2: Take turns and say something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State where I Notice that the kind of learning taught at school is called 'Defensive Learning'. It is an approach claiming that you can only learn about what you already know about. Defensive Learning conglomerates all learning onto the one acceptable 'Knowledge Continent' by fitting it into its 'proper' place. Anything that has no place to dock-onto the Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware Curriculum remains at best invisible, or at worst, it becomes a basis for calling you crazy. I have started reclaiming the kind of learning I used before going to school, namely 'Expansive Learning'. When I discover something that does not fit onto any of my current Knowledge Continents, it stays afloat in my awareness and originates a new Knowledge Continent. I maintain access to hundreds of co-existing diverse new Knowledge Continents and can remain happy, sane, and very creative."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your newly Upgraded learning Thoughtware by doing the following Experiment at your next Possibility Team meeting. Sit together in the big circle with your Beep! Book in hand, then Scan your early life and select a small, long-lost Knowledge Continent that has been adrift in your world for some time. It could be anything: picking locks, or growing Curcurbita Maxima squash, or playing Bach's Toccatta and Fugue in D Minor on your flute, or building a mouse trap that catches mice alive, or baking croissant, or spelunking, or learning to dance the Lindy Hop, or... (on and on, well past infinity).

      At the meeting, write down exactly what your lost Knowledge Continents are about, and what exactly happened in those moments that you abandonned these Knowledge Continents for so long. (It could well be different moments and different incidents for each Knowledge Continents that you abandonned.)

      NOTE: You may need to do one or more Emotional Healing Processes (EHP) to allow yourself to set foot back onto each of these special little Knowledge Continents. Do at least the first of these EHP(s) with each other at your Possibility Team meeting.

      Still at the Possibility Team meeting, thoroughly reinhabit your special Knowledge Continent for no particular reason, and share with the others what it is like, what it is all about for you.

      Then, still at your Possibility Team, help each other plot out where you will go hunting to retrieve lost parts of your inspiration. Some of you might want to join each other on the expeditions and Adventure Days! Let these new territories feed your 5 Bodies to an absurdly ecstatic degree. In your Beep! Book, write a free-verse poem about the possibilities of Expansive Learning while exploring your recovered Knowledge Continents.

      PART 4: For the next 7 intense days, explore one or more of your recently recovered abandonned Knowledge Continents, alone or with Team members. Write and publish an Article about the astonishing changes that come from rediscovering your abandonned Knowledge Continents, including details from your own journey. Read your Article at your next Possibility Team.

      After reading your Article at your next Possibility Team, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.03 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please enter the link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #4 S.H.I.T. SAYS YOUR LIFE IS LIMITED TO THE 'VERBAL REALITY' YOU LEARNED AS READING AND WRITING IN SCHOOL. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS YOU CAN LOWER YOUR NUMBNESS BAR AND EXPAND OUT OF THE 'VERBAL REALITY' INTO 5 BODY 'EXPERIENTIAL REALITY' WHICH IS A FAR BIGGER SOURCE OF POSSIBILITY.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.04

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding 'Verbal Reality' and 'Experiential Reality' by reading through the Experiential Reality website.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other, "I used to think that I was connected to Reality."

      PART 2: Take turns and say something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State where I am shocked to see how I am only connected to my mind. Most of Reality slips by me while I stay numb, unconsciously terrified, blind to potentials, reactive rather than interactive, living in excruciating scarcity, isolating myself from my abundant inner and outer resources. There is so much of Reality that I am a stranger to."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware. In this case, your Experiment could be to go outside with the members of your Possibility Team and find some trees. Walk around under the Trees. Each person chooses a tree and says, "Hello Tree." Share with your Team Members your sense of what the Trees says back to you. Then ask the tree, "Would you please give me a small stick? I need a small piece of wood to carry around to help me escape from my Verbal Reality prison and step into the multiple dimensions of Experiential Reality. I don't know how to do this. I need your help. Could you please help me come back to life as a 5 Body human being on Earth and connected with Gaia rather than staying stuck in the prison of my own mind?"

      If you are lucky you will feel an emotion, perhaps sadness, some grief about how long you have been cut off from life at large. Work in pairs. Listen and speak with each other and your trees. Perhaps the tree will express anger at you, or joy... Let yourself feel these feelings out loud, as freely as you can. Let the rages shout. Let the fears scream. Let the tears roll down your cheeks to water the roots of the tree. Feel the warmth and then the coldness of your tears. Do not wipe the tears away. Feel them dry into streaks of salt that itch on your skin. Let it itch. These sensations are the Experiential Reality of life happening.

      If you are even more lucky, a small piece of wood will come to your Attention. Do not pick it up at first. Instead, sense into how this particular piece of wood was brought to your Attention. What made you look at it? Notice the sensations. Why this particular piece of wood? Which tree did it grow on? How did that tree communicate with you in a way that brought your Attention to that piece of wood, as you asked it to?

      Move your Attention to that tree. Move closer and put your hands on that tree. Send gratitude to the Being of the tree that it heard your plea for help and gave you the piece of wood, even if you may never have thanked a tree before in your life for giving you all the wood you thoughtlessly used for tables, chairs, roof beams, cutting boards, shelves, campfires, chopsticks, wooden spatulas, toothpicks, and so on. You have used all that wood like a selfish unconscious little child, uncaring of the trees. Express gratitude to this particular tree you are touching for giving you a Reminding Factor now, a small stick with the potential of helping you regain your 5 Body aliveness.

      Keep breathing. Forget the "Blah! Blah!" going on in your mind. Focus on the piece of wood now. Gradually bend over and touch the piece of wood as slowly as you can possibly move. As slowly as a slug. Let the sensations of touching the wood enter your 5 Bodies in ripples of sensations that go all the way down to your toes. If the sensations do not reach your toes, this is how numb you really are. Keep practicing. It can be an immensely intense set of experiences.

      Slowly take the piece of wood into your fingers. For the next week, never put this stick down, even when eating, even when taking a shower, even when you go to sleep. Let the stick help you stop naming each and every person, place, thing, occurance or experience with words for 7 days. Instead of hammering life until it fits into the pigeon-hole concepts of Verbal Reality, let things be nameless for you. Let them be what they are, so their vast Potentials remain unpredefined, free of the Verbal straightjackets that come from your culture and its beliefs.

      In your Possibility Team, discuss what is bigger? The set of all things? Or the set of things you have a name for? Which set do you want to have access to?

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, carry your Reminding Factor stick and communicate with it, writing down what it says in your Beep! Book, and sharing what you wrote at your next Possibility Team meeing. During the week, whenever you want to communicate about a person, place, thing, experience, or process that you are sensing in Experiential Reality, use your Possibility Paintbrush and paint a verbal bridge out of words into the other person's body, so that they can experience what you are experiencing. The rest of the time, enjoy all the sensations of Experiential Reality without words attached. Sense how much inner Space and expanded sensations you gain.

      After sharing in your Possibility Team what your Reminding Factor stick told you,

      please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.04 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #5 S.H.I.T. SAYS YOUR POTENTIAL IS LIMITED TO YOUR SURVIVAL STRATEGY. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS YOU ARE YOUR BEING, HIDING OUT IN A SURVIVAL BOX WHICH YOU BUILT AS A CHILD. YOUR BEING IS NOT YOUR BOX, AND NEITHER IS THEIR BEING THEIR BOX. IT IS POSSIBLE FOR YOUR BEING TO SHED YOUR BOX LIKE OLD SNAKESKIN SO YOUR BEING CAN COME OUT AND PLAY.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.5

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) about your 'Box' by studying and Experimenting through the Box Technology, Reactivity, Survival Strategy, Parts, Baggage, and Box and Being websites.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other, "I used to think that I was a Human Being."

      PART 2: Take turns and say something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State by doing Self Observation to Notice that I have identified myself as being my dead mechanical defense strategy, my Box, where each Part takes over whenever it gets emotionally triggered. I am mostly unaware of what causes me to Shift Identity. By discovering that I am a Being inside of a self-made Box, my new Experiential Clarity gives me the Possibility of clicking my Clicker and making my Box Optional as a ten centimeter cube in the palm of my other hand, held out with the palm facing upwards. With my Box over there in my hand, I can stay Unhookable and enjoy a Being to Being connection with this other person."

      In your Possibility Team, work in pairs and Practice this Being-to-Being Connection with your Box shrunk down to a 10cm cube over in the palm of your hand Experiment until it makes experiential sense to you. Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: With your Possibility Team, test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware by doing the following Self Observation Experiment. At your Possibility Team meeting, title a new Beep! Book page 'MY BOX', and there you write down all of your Box's automatic Survival Strategies, necessities, fears, conclusions, stories, opinions, prejudices, isolation, and domination techniques. After 20 minutes of introspective writing, share what you wrote with the rest of the members of your Possibility Team, and listen while they share theirs.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, the instant any of these issues arises in your awareness as an identity masquerading as if it is 'the most important thing in your life', immediately shift into a Meta Conversation and tell the people around you, "My Box is freaking out right now about (and say precisely what it is freaking out about)... but, I am not." Then put a dot by that item on your 'MY BOX' list to find which of your Box Survival Strategies are the most common. Share what you discover at your next Possibility Team meeting.

      After Observing for 7 days and sharing at your Possibility Team explicitly what you learned about your personal Box Mechanics, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.05 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #6 S.H.I.T. SAYS YOU ARE SOLID AND YOUR LIFE PATH IS FIXED. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWRE SAYS THE UNIVERSE INTERACTS WITH YOU ACCORDING TO THE SHAPE OF YOUR BEING. CHANGING THE SHAPE OF YOUR BEING GIVES YOU A NEW LIFE. HOWEVER, BETWEEN ONE SOLID SHAPE AND ANOTHER SOLID SHAPE IS A LIQUID STATE. YOU CAN MAKE THE LIQUID STATE YOUR NEW HOME.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.06

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) about 'Liquid States' by studying and Experimenting through the Liquid State website.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other that, "I used to think that I could hold things rigidly in place."

      PART 2: Take turns and say something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State by acknowledging that my belief system worldview is a tight prison which I built to keep by Being from being in the world. My Box defended its own image against any change and kept be from really being with you in the world. By feeling the pain of this now, I am able to let my Box's beliefs shatter and enter a Liquid State which is changing my shape. When my Box changes shape, my Being can change its shape, like pouring water into a different shaped glass changes the shape of the water. My Being's new shape enables the Universe to collaborate me in a different way. There is no real change without a transformational Liquid State."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment in pairs sitting in chairs. The Possibilitator completely shifts their current reality by going to the Edge of thair Box and staying there and speaking about their feelings and thoughts for 13 minutes. The other Possibilitator Holds Space for them. Then change roles..

      PART 4: Then for the next 7 days, organize yourself in Teams of 3 persons in a 'Liquid State 3Cell'. Each of you writes down 20 actions that your Box prevents you from doing because the actions are too frightening for your Box, far beyond what your Box ordinarily permits as acceptable, too silly, or too visible. Then commit to helping each other do all 20 actions this week! Stay in the Liquid State that starts already with the decision of completing your list. Can you be liquid for a day? What about all week?

      If anyone asks you what is going on for you because you seem so strange, or communicative, or ecstatic, or emotional, simply say something like. "I am fine. I am doing Thoughtware Upgrade #6 this week with my 3Cell from my Possibility Team. I am learning a lot about things I never imagined could be learned about. It is High Level Fun!"

      After doing your list of 20 Box Edgework Experiments with your 3Cell, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.06 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 20 Matrix Points.

      #7 S.H.I.T. SAYS MODERN CULTURE IS ALL THERE IS. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS THAT BY GOING TO THE EDGE OF YOUR CULTURE AND STAYING THERE LONG ENOUGH TO DESIGN AND DO TINY EXPERIMENTS, YOU WILL EXPAND YOUR BOX INTO DIMENSIONS NOT CONTROLLABLE BY MODERN CULTURE'S WORLDVIEW.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.07

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) about the importance of keeping your thinking and experiencing within the narrow thoughtlimits of the capitalist patriarchal empire by studying and doing the Experiments together on the Patriarchy and What Now websites.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other that, "I used to imagine that modern culture is all that matters, and all that is real, because this is what they taught me and what so many other people think."

      PART 2: Take turns and say something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State by standing over here on the Edge of modern culture and looking around. It is uncomfortablc, but from here I can see 2 separate views. One view is back over my shoulder seeing that modern culture people are not aware that their culture has an edge, and that this edge is so close to them that they must stay in Denial not to see it. The other view is looking out over the Edge. The first thing I see there is... nothing. A big gap of nothing, a culturless void. And then far in the distance I see an entirely different culture, a next culture. It is regenerative. It works in circles instead of hierarchical pyramids. It has a Bill of Wrongs and a nonmaterial economics of calling forth potentials and collaborating to create possibility using infinite Archetypal resources."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment in pairs sitting in chairs. Your job as a Team is to Go To The Edge of modern culture in your Possibility Team Space and design a small experiment to do at that cultural Edge that you can do during the week. It could be a simple as standing still for 13 minutes each day in a modern culture space and scanning anyone who walks by to see if they notice the Edge you are standing on, or not. Write down in your Beep! Book the tricks they use to ignore the obvious Edge you represent. Their tricks might include:

      • Chasing after the clock and moving faster than the speed of Love.
      • Being 100% absorbed in their phone and their mind's Fantasy Worlds.
      • Staring into shopping windows, plotting their next greedy purchase.
      • Comparing themselves with the dress and manner of others who are walking around.
      • Giving their Center away to their children and trying to pacify the children's Gremlins.
      • Staying absorbed in some Low Drama inside their own heart.
      • Fantasizing Revenge against someone who did not fulfill an Expectation.
      • Etc.

      At the same time, write down what they are missing, what they are not seeing. What else could that person be doing now to Expand their Box if they were standing at the Edge of modern culture with you at your side?

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, please Cavitate a safe enough Space in which you can do 13 minutes of Edge-Scanning research. Make abundant notes in your Beep! Book about what you discover. Share your 7 Experiments in an Article that you publish at the end of your week.

      After publishing your Article about your 7 days of 13 minute long Edge-Scanning research, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.07 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please enter the link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #8 S.H.I.T. SAYS MODERN CULTURE THOUGHTWARE IS THE BEST THING HUMAN BEINGS EVER INVENTED. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS YOUR PARENTS AND CULTURE ABSENTMINDEDLY GAVE YOU STANDARD HUMAN INTELLIGENCE THOUGHTWARE (S.H.I.T.), BUT THERE ARE NEW THOUGHTWARE UPGRADES AVAILABLE THAT GIVE YOU MORE TO EXPLORE, AND MORE TO EXPLORE WITH.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.08

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) about Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware by studying and doing the Experiments together on the Thoughtware and the S.H.I.T. websites. In particular, watch and discuss the ideas in the first Harry and Samantha Thoughtware Workout video together:

      https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QbbwwIwPYJ4.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other that, "I used to imagine that what everyone uses to think with is the same, and that this does not really matter."

      PART 2: Take turns and say something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State by thinking about what I am thinking with. I am learning to Inner Navigate and differentiate, for example, between my thoughts and my feelings, and between different kinds of thinking, such as Conclusions, Prejudices, Beliefs, Excuses, Judgments, Assumptions, Expectations, Witchhunting, Looking for Loopholes, Taking A Stand, etc. Thinking about what I am thinking with helps me Navigate Space to create Extraordinary Love in Radical Relating. I am loving the empowerment coming from this new Clarity."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment in groups of 3, sitting in chairs. The Client interacts normally as themselves, the Possibilitator - sitting directly across from the Client - tries to say what kind of thinking they are using while they are speaking during an ordinary conversation with the Client, and the Coach coaches the Possibilitator to help them identify the kinds of Thoughtware they are using. The coach writes into the Possibilitator's Beep! Book the specific kinds of thinking that the Possibilator is not so good at Noticing.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, 7 times during each day, tell the person you are speaking with the kind of thinking that you Notice you are doing while talking with them. If they ask you why you are telling them this, say something like,"I am starting to differentiate between the different ways I think. I am Noticing what I am Noticing. It helps me create a clearer inner map if I say what I Notice out loud. If it bothers you I will stop telling you."

      After 7 days where you include 7 Metaconversations about the kinds of thinking you are using, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.08 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #9 S.H.I.T. SAYS THERE IS NOTHING NEW UNDER THE SUN. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS YOU CAN LEARN WAYS TO CREATE AND APPLY NONLINEAR POSSIBILITIES THAT NO ONE HAS EVER SEEN OR TRIED BEFORE.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.09

      In ordinary understanding, 'possibility' implies that something could be, that there is a chance. In the Archan language, 'Possibility' is defined as 'the measurable number of real options you have available from which to choose'. That means if you have a lot of real options to choose from, you have a lot of Possibility. If you have few real options to choose from, you have little Possibility. If you have real Possibility, you can have, or be, or create anything, meaning, Possibility could be the most valuable thing in the Universe. Possibility Management is the field of research and Practice regarding how to create and manage Possibility.

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) about Possibility by studying and doing the Experiments together on the Possibility and the Create Possibility websites.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other that, "I used to think of 'possibility' as a measure of probability, like maybe something will happen, and maybe it won't."

      PART 2: Take turns and say something like, "Now with the help of the Thoughtmaps, and Practices for being Radically Responsible I am learning how much Possibility is available to me and my Team through Intentionally resetting the Context of the Spaces we work in together. If there is too much Possibility - too many options to choose from - then I kill some. If there is not enough Possibility - too few options to choose from - then I call more to life. It turns out that the Universe is on my side, because Possibility is a Bright Principle, an Archetypal Force of Nature, which means it is an Infinite Resource for us, for free. And it ongoingly gives us the kind of Treasure that grows by giving it away. Now my friends and I come together each week to Create Possibility for each other at our Possibility Team. Modern culture doesn't teach us anything about this stuff. Would you like to come check it out?"

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment in groups of 3 sitting in chairs. One person is the Client who already has a list of 'important but not urgent' things to do or to accomplish.... The other two people are Possibilitators sitting in chairs directly across from and facing the Client. The Client - says, "Please give me Possibility about..." (about one specific thing they chose from their list) and then starts writing as fast as they can while the other two Possibilitators click their Clickers and become mouthpieces through which the Bright Principle of Possibility can provide unlimited resources. Both speak nonstop at the same time... because the Client has two ears. Go for 5 to 7 minutes, then pause and change roles.

      PART 4: During the next 7 days, at least 3 times each day, when someone complains, or blames, or resents, or gossips, respond by saying, "Would you like some Possibility about your situation?" If they say, "Yes," then ask them to get a pen and their Beep! Book to write down what you say. Refuse to speak unless they write down exactly what you say. Why? Because their Box and Gremlin will be blocking them from understanding the Possibility you offer them, and if they write it down in their Beep! Book now, they can read it later when they are less Reactive. Click your Clicker, shift into being the Space through which Possibility can do its work in the world, then don't stop speaking for 3 to 5 minutes.

      After Creating Possibility for different people 3 times a day for 7 days, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.09 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #10 S.H.I.T. SAYS YOUR CIRCUMSTANCES DETERMINE YOUR LIFE. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS IF YOU WANT TO CREATE NEW RESULTS BUT YOU CANNOT CHANGE YOUR CIRCUMSTANCES, THEN CHANGE WHAT IS POSSIBLE.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.10

      Possibility Management is the art and science of creating and managing both linear and nonlinear Possibility.

      One way to gain access to Possibility is to remove or transcend whatever Energetic Blocks, Assumptions, Expectations, Conclusions, Stories, Beliefs, or Unconscious Fears currently block your access to that Possibility.

      Another way to access new Possibility is to relocate your Point Of Origin to a new Context that has the Possibility that you need.

      Another way to access new Possibility is to change the shape of your Being by integrating new Distinctions into your Being, or Completing Incomplete Emotions, or Building new Matrix, or changing a Past Life Vow, or making a new Commitment. When your Being has a new shape, the Universe interacts with you differently and you will naturally have access to new Possibilities.

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) about changing the shape of your Being to access Possibility by selecting the most applicable of the above underlined websites, studying one or two of them, and doing the Experiments together.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other that, "I used to think that I was a victim of circumstances, that the external world determined the quality of my life and relationships."

      PART 2: Take turns and say something like, "Now I see that I have been using modern culture's linear 'work-hard and become successful' worldview instead of going sideways to the source of the matter, which is the shape of my Being. I now stand before dozens of approaches for starting over and revamping how the Universe and I relate. The Universe is not interested in whether I have the latest iPhone or electric car. The Universe wants me to grow up and venture into the Archetypal Domains by makng 5 Body Intimacy Journeys, and bring Infinite Nonmaterial Resources back to humanity and Gaia. Who is with me?"

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment sitting in chairs in groups of 3. One person is the Possibilitator who will practice Creating Possibility. The second person is the Client who sits across from the Possibilitator. The third person is the Coach who sits next to and coaches the Possibilitator.

      The Possibilitator shakes hands with the Client, and asks the Client, "What can I do for you." The Client reviews what they have been discovering in this Possibility Team Meeting and selects from one of the websites which way they would like to start over in their life by having a new shape for their Being. The Possibilitator and Coach pull up that website or the associated S.P.A.R.K. and read the script while navigating the Being-Shift Process for the Client.

      Do you already know how to do this? No. You do not. That is why we start now. If you never start, you will never learn how to Hold and Navigate these kinds of Healing and Transformational Spaces. It will probably be a M.E.S.S. Don't worry about it. Just go with the flow, keeping all Gremlins on a short chain at your side. If you are lucky your Client will feel some kind of Liquid State and some change will occur. Run the Proces for about 15-20 minutes then bring it to a close. Make sure the Coach writes down any new decisions the Client might make, or the details of any Experiments you recommend to them. Then rotate roles and start again.

      PART 4: During the next 7 days, write and publish a short Article about your Experiment with having someone Hold Space for you while you change the shape of your Being. Read your Article at your next Possibility Team meeting.

      After publishing your Article about living with your new shape of Being, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.10 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please give the link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #11 S.H.I.T. SAYS YOU LEARN WHAT YOU NEED TO KNOW IN SCHOOL. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS YOU WERE BORN WITH AN ENERGETIC TOOLBELT CARRYING AT LEAST 13 ENERGETIC TOOLS. BY LEARNING TO USE THESE TOOLS PLUS THE ASSOCITED SENSORS AND DETECTORS, YOUR ENERGETIC BODY COMES TO LIFE IN UNPRECEDENTED YET PRACTICAL WAYS.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.11

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding what you were taught to live a good life by studying and doing the Experiments together on the 13 Tools and Not Knowing websites.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other that,"I used to think that Reading, Riting, and Rithmatic (the 3 R's) would lead me to a rich life of intimacy and creation. I trusted my parents, society, and the school system. So much was missing."

      PART 2: Take turns and say something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State by discovering I have so many built-in Tools and Detectors that modern culture knows nothing about. Each Tool opens up new capacities that come to life immediately the instant I use the Tool, and I never knew the Tools existed. They are always attached to my Possibilitator Toolbelt, ready to jump to life. There is my Sword of Clarity, my Clicker, my Disk of Nothing, my Wand of Declaration, my Possibility Paintbrush, my Is Glue, my Is Glue Dissolver, my Golden Key, my Bag of Things, my Voice Blaster, my Red Cloth, my Gremlin Chain, my Feelings Detector, my Bullshit Detector, my Purpose Sniffer. I can even use a Possibility Stone!"

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment in groups of 3. The Client selects one of the 13 Tools to practice using, and tells the Possibilitator which one it is. The Coach checks if everyone is ready to start. When all agree, the Coach says, "Go!" and the Client creates a scenario where the Possibilitator needs to use the selected Tool. The Coaching is realtime Go! Beep! Shift! Go!, meaning, both the Client and the Coach can interrupt at any moment - even when it looks like nothing is happening - and shout, "Beep! Pay more attention to the Context of the Space! You lost the Space of Nonlinear Possibility. Shift! Go!" Or, "Beep! You lost contact with the Client and went into your head. Stay more Present and in contact, and use your Possibility Paintbrush to Improvise what needs to be said! Shift! Go!" Or, "Beep! You are trying to imagine that your Tool is working instead of using the energetic Tool! Take a Stand for your Tool and use it! Declare the Boundary! Dissolve the Story and Propose an alternative that has more Possibility!" Or, "Beep! You are using the Red Cloth, but you forgot to keep using your Sword of Clarity! Split your Attention more!" Or, "Beep! Use your Wand of Declaration to Declare more energetic arms on your body with more Tools if you need them! Stop being limited to only having two arms and 13 Tools! Shift! Go!" Whatever needs to be said. Go for 13 minutes per person, then rotate roles and start again.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, use as many of your 13 Tools as you can. Even if you do not really need to use them, go out of your way to bring your 13 Tools into play. Write notes in your Beep! Book about each time you use one or more of your Tools and what you were able to create with them. Read your notes at your next Possibility Team meeting.

      After reading your 13 Tools Experiment Notes at your Possibility Team, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.11 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #12 S.H.I.T. SAYS TALKING IS TALKING. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS YOU CAN LEARN NEW WAYS OF SPEAKING THAT UNLEASH CORE POTENTIALS AND CAPABILITIES FROM YOU AND YOUR FRIENDS.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.12

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding speaking, while you study and do the Experiments together on the Speakings and Dragon Speaking websites.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other that,"I used to think that there was only one kind of speaking, Normal Neurotic Speaking. People babble about what's on their mind. People talk and it makes a mess, but that's how it is when people talk."

      PART 2: Take turns and say something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State by discovering there are many different sorts of Speakings, depending on the Context, the Purpose, and the desired Results of the Speaking. Many people assume it is possible to get different Results by duplicating the same behavior! This is crazy thinking! Only with different behavior can you get different Results! Now I sense that there is 1. Normal Neurotic Speaking, 2. Discussion (either Neurotic or Adult), 3. Adult Speaking, 4. Possibility Speaking (where you can speak about more than you know), 5. Discovery Speaking, 6. Dragon Speaking, 7. Speaking from the Unknown, 8. Transformational Speaking, etc."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment in groups of 3. One person is the Client and sits directly across from the Possibilitator and participates as themselves in a converstion. The Possibilitator uses all these 8 kinds of speakings one after the other in an 8 minute conversation. The Coach sits next to and coaches the Possibilitator with Beep! Shift! Go! real-time coaching. Just before the Possibilitator switches to a new kind of Speaking, they announce the kind of Speaking they will use next.

      It won't take long for you to Notice that Upgrading your Thoughtware is one thing, but developing new Possibilitator Skills for applying your Upgraded Thoughtware is an entirely different thing.

      Developing Possibilitator Skills takes Practice. There is value in changing how you see your life into seeing it as A Life Of Practice.

      After the 8 minutes, both the Client and the Coach give the Possibilitator 2 minutes of Feedback and Coaching, which the Possibilitator writes down in their Beep! Book. Then all rotate positions into a new chair and start over, until everyone has had a chance to practice these 8 kinds of Speaking.

      PART 4: During the next 7 days, continue your Experiment of consciously using a precise form of Speaking in each specific situation. You don't have to announce which form of Speaking out loud to your listener(s), but... you could! This might lead to interesting conversations!

      After intentionally practicing these 8 kinds of Speaking for 7 days, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.12 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #13 S.H.I.T. SAYS IF YOU HAVE EARS YOU ARE LISTENING. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS YOU CAN LEARN NEW WAYS OF LISTENING THAT AWAKEN NEW POTENTIALS AND CAPABILITIES IN THE PEOPLE (AND OTHER CONSCIOUSNESSES) YOU LISTEN TO.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.13

      Authentic listening is not about being a slave of other people's beliefs or rules. As a child you were told, "Listen to your mother! Do what your father says!" However, since children do what their parents do, not what their parents say, when the father says, "Listen to your mother," it is not difficult to guess that the child is not listening to his mother because his father is not listening to her either, and she is not listening to him. Why should the child listen when nobody else is listening to each other in the house?

      When the boss says, "I am your boss so you should listen carefully," you are being forced to listen under threat, therefore, you will listen for what you need to survive. You have learned to listen for survival purposes. You listen for slight change of tone in your dad's (or mom's) voice before they explode so that you to get out of their way. You listen to the teacher's hidden implications about what the next test will be about. You listen for what behaviors or words make your mom happy so you can please her easily. You listen for the slightest threats to know what they think is wrong or bad so that you have an Excuse for when the questioning starts.

      You learned to listen for alcohol in your father, or depression in your mother. You listened for how hungry is your brother's Gremlin? But when you were 18 years old, you were ready to shift out of Survival Listening into listening for Life.

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding listening while you study and do the Experiments together on the Listenings website.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other that,"I used to think that there was only one kind of listening, Survival Listening, what to watch out for so I can survive. This is Normal Neurotic Listening where I don't actually care about the other person."

      PART 2: Take turns and say something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State by discovering there are many different sorts of Listenings, depending on the Context, the Purpose, and the desired Results of the Listening. Now I sense that there is 1. Normal Neurotic Listening, 2. Adult Listening, 3. Possibility Listening (where you can listen to more than you can understand), 4. Discovery Listening, 5. Listening to the Universe, 6. Transformational Listening, etc."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment in groups of 3. One person is the Client and sits directly across from the Possibilitator and speaks as themselves in a converstion. The Possibilitator uses all these 6 kinds of Listenings one after the other in an 8 minute conversation. The Coach sits next to and coaches the Possibilitator with Beep! Shift! Go! real-time coaching, in particular with regards to the quality of the Completion Loops the Possibilitator delivers. Just before the Possibilitator switches to a new kind of Listening, they announce the kind of Listening they will use next.

      The Coach also watches for change in the Possibilitator. If the Possibilitator is not changed, they did not hear what the Client said. Coach, do not hesitate to interrupt the Possibilitator and say, "You did not hear what the Client just said. If you heard it, you would feel something. You would start thinking differently. You would have authentic questions about yourself and the world. Possibilitator, please stand up, turn around 360 degrees and sit down again. Client, please repeat what you said. And Possibilitator, this time, see if you can let it in enough to be touched."

      It won't take long for you to Notice that Upgrading your Thoughtware is one thing, but developing new Possibilitator Skills for applying your Upgraded Thoughtware is an entirely different thing.

      Developing Possibilitator Skills takes Practice. There is value in changing how you see your life into seeing it as A Life Of Practice.

      After the 8 minutes, both the Client and the Coach give the Possibilitator 2 minutes of Feedback and Coaching about their Listening, which the Possibilitator writes down in their Beep! Book. Then all rotate positions into a new chair and start over, until everyone has had a chance to practice these 8 kinds of Speaking.

      PART 4: During the the next 7 days, continue your Experiment of consciously using a precise form of Listening in each specific situation. You don't have to announce which form of Listening out loud to your speaker(s), but... you could! This might lead to interesting conversations!

      After intentionally practicing these 6 kinds of Listening for 7 days, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.13 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #14 S.H.I.T. SAYS WHATEVER STORY YOU BELIEVE IN IS TRUE. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS HUMANS ARE STORY-MAKERS. STORIES MAY BE USEFUL BUT THEY ARE ALL UNTRUE. 'BULLSHIT' IS ANY STORY THAT IS DISTANT FROM REALITY. YOU HAVE A BUILT IN BULLSHIT DETECTOR TO DETECT A STORY'S DISTANCE FROM REALITY, AND THEREFORE ITS USEFULNESS.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.14

      Imagine trying to negotiate intimacy, trying to live in a Bridgehouse or Archiarchy Invention Center (AIC) or Nanonation, trying to create a gameworld, or trying to participate in navigating your circle, without having a honed Bullshit Detector turned on and actively applied during each interaction. What a mess it would be!

      And! By keeping your Bullshit Detector off, not using its results, this carries an ulterior and probably hidden purpose: to create the betrayal, victim stories, broken heartedness, deception, foolhardiness, gullibility, and revenge that trigger a Gremlin Feeding Frenzy.

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding Bullshit while you study and do the Experiments together on the Bullshit Detector and Sword Of Clarity websites.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other that,"I used to think that 'Bullshit' was a 'bad' word, or that Bullshit is 'bad', that naming something as 'Bullshit!' was a way to start a fight or to offend someone. I thought people said 'Bullshit!' when they were emotionally reactive or wanted to attack what was being said."

      PART 2: Take turns and say something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State by keeping my Sword Of Clarity to hand and my Bullshit Detector set on High Sensistivity, by being willing to be Asshole enough to instantly name in Bullshit as Bullshit - putting Bullshit on the table together to see what is behind it. I am seeing that by doing this I create an extraordinary Context in my Spaces where Radical Relating and Archan Relating can happen. Some Stories are useful. Some Stories are not useful. But ALL Stories are not true! Bullshit is a Story that is not useful because it is far away from Radical Reality. Now we can be Edgeworkers together, venturing past Edges into Radical Reality and into the Archetypal Domains. I am finding my extroardinary Team, and we are on our way to creating and inhabiting regenerative human culture, Archiarchy."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment in groups of 3. One person is the Client who sits directly across from the Possibilitator and speaks as themselves in a converstion. The Possibilitator uses their Bullshit Detector turned to High Sensitivity, and indicates everything the Client says that is Bullshit, immediately supplying an explanation about the nature of the Bullshit, and alternatives to try that bring them closer to Radical Reality. The Coach coaches the Possibilitator. Do this for 10 minutes per person, then rotate positions, then do it again with other participants to Notice similarities and differences. Share what you learn with the other Possibility Team members.

      NOTE FOR THE COACHES: There is a vast difference between, 1. Calling "Bullshit!" on something, 2. Having an emotional Reaction, and, 3. Simply not having the Matrix to hold or use the Distinctions. It is the Coaches job to catch the Possibilitator in these precisions, and to make sure they are calling "Bullshit!" when it is Memetically authentic "Bullshit!" and not just some personal reaction from the Possibilitator.

      The Coach sits next to and coaches the Possibilitator with Beep! Shift! Go! real-time coaching, in particular with regards to the quality of explanation the Possibilitator gives to substantiate their "Bullshit!" claim, and also the quality and power of the options the Possibilitator gives to the Client to re-examine their relationship to the things being spoken about.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, keep your Bullshit Detector set to high sensitivity. Notice what you Notice. Write down in your Beep! Book things that you discovered are Bullshit that you previously have regarded as 'true' or 'real'. Do not be surprised if you start feeling blown-away about how much Bullshit is detected in ordinary conversations. It is a narrow road to Radical Reality. There is so much Bullshit in the general public world these days.

      After detecting and documenting Bullshit for 7 days in your Beep! Book, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.14 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #15 S.H.I.T. SAYS YOU HAVE THE RIGHT TO REMAIN SILENT AND CALL A LAWYER. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS YOU HAVE 3 CORE POWERS: DECLARING, CHOOSING, AND ASKING, AND WITH THESE YOU CAN CREATE AND DESTROY WORLDS.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.15

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) about your 3 Powers by studying the 3 Powers, Declaring, Choosing, and Asking websites and doing the Experiments together.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other how,"I used to think that I was properly educated and trained because I went to school. I thought school was so important that I graduated from the University with a degree in ____ (if that is true). I thought school was giving me what I needed to be alive in the world. I was not aware that Human Beings have Potentials and Awarenesses that modern culture knows NOTHING about."

      PART 2: Take turns to say something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State which comes from realizing that Human Beings have Potentials, Resources, and Powers that I have not been trained in. I never learned about these things, but by doing Edgework research, and by Practicing new skills with my Team, I am learning that Declaring is a 'Speech Act', to say what is so (such as Taking A Stand, Appreciating the qualities of another person's Being, Making A Promise, giving something a name), and that I can Choose from options that are not given on the menu, and that I can ask Quest-Ions the answers to which do not exist in the current Space."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment in groups of 3. One person is the Client who sits directly across from the Possibilitator. The third person is the Coach, sitting at the side to coach the Possibilitator. The Client begins by saying, "Make a Declaration to me." Then the Possibilitator makes a Declaration. The Coach says either "Go!" in which case the Client says the next thing. Or the Coach says, "Beep!" in which case the Coach says what worked about the Speech Act, and what the Possibilitator could try next time to make a more clear and powerful Declaration. (For example, adjust their posture, make better eye contact, speak from the Center, speak slower, hold more intention to land the Declaration in the Space or in the Client's body, etc.) Then the Coach says, "Shift! Go!" Then the Client gives their next command, such as, "Make a Request." Or, "Choose something." The Coach continues to Coach the Possibilitator. Practice for 10 minutes per person, then get into new groups of 3 and start over.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, do Conscious Declaring 5 times in one day by publicly announcing your Appreciation of the quality of Being of 5 different persons, then the next day do Conscious Choosing 5 times that day where you publicly choose an option that is not offered on the menu of given choices, and on the third day do Conscious Asking 5 times per day where you ask Quest-Ions, the answers to which do not exist in the current Space. On day 4, start over again with Conscious Declaring. Cycle through these 3 practice cycles. Consider becoming absurdly skillful in consciously Declaring, Choosing, and Asking. Also Notice the level of Consciousness of other people's Declaring, Choosing, and Asking, and make notes in your Beep! Book about what this causes for them. Then give a recorded WorkTalk (online or offline) about your Experiments and the results they have created in your life, guiding participants to do a mini-version of this same Experiment of practicing their 3 Powers during your WorkTalk.

      After uploading a video of your WorkTalk to your YouTube page, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.15 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #16 S.H.I.T. SAYS YOU MUST OBEY THE LAW AND FOLLOW ORDERS FROM YOUR SUPERIORS. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS YOU CAN DEVELOP THE ABILITY TO BE CENTERED IN EACH OF YOUR FIVE BODIES, AND THEN YOU WILL KNOW WHAT TO DO NEXT BECAUSE IT IS OBVIOUS.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.16

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) about Being Centered by reading through the Become Centered website and doing the Experiments together.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other how, "I used to have no awareness at all about being Centered or being Adaptive. I did not know why I did this, or what it cost me. I just tried to survive by giving my Center away whenever it seemed necessary, and then I made up Justifications to pacify my sad and wounded Being."

      PART 2: Take turns to say something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State. I am Noticing that I can develop skills for being Centered in each of my 5 Bodies:
