      1. I am Centered in my Physical Body when I notice I am thirsty, hungry, tired, energized, enjoying the taste of orange juice, the crunch of toasted bread, the smell of coffee.
      2. I am Centered in my Intellectual Body when I am free of the Voices in my head.
      3. I am Centered in my Emotional Body when I can detect the difference between my Feelings and my Emotions and immediately put them to proper use. Emotions are for healing. Feelings are for creating.
      4. I am Centered in my Energetic Body when I have intentionally moved my Energetic Center to my Physical Center.
      5. I am Centered in my Archetypal Body when I apply my Infinite Resources such as my Bright Principles and my Archetypal Lineage in the Space I am Holding."

      And when I am simultaneously Centered in all 5 Bodies, a new capacity and sensation arises: I am Present!"

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment in groups of 3. One person is the Client who sits directly across from the Possibilitator and interacts as themselves in a converstion. Alternatively (at the Possibilitator's request) the Client can stand up and rotate 360 degrees and Shift Identity into whoever the Possibilitator asks them to become for this exercise - perhaps their boss, neighbor, child, ex-partner, parent... someone with whom they might still be Being Adaptive, or to whom they might still be giving their Center away.

      Being Adaptive and giving your Center away are childhood Survival Strategies. These behaviors work to help you Survive. They fail to help you Live. Upgrading Thoughtware allows you to enter new domains of Adulthood Aliveness.

      During the conversation, the Possibilitator tries to keep their Center in all 5 Bodies while continuing to interact with the Client.

      The Coach uses their own 5 Centers to detect each instant the Possibilitator has become Adaptive or Uncentered in any of their 5 Bodies. The Coach shouts, for example, "Beep! You are Uncentered in your Intellectual Body because you did not say what you were really thinking just then. You were trying to 'be nice' and not reveal your actual Clarity about this topic. Try being Authentic with the Client by keeping your Intellectual Center and saying what you really think. Shift! Go!" After each, "Beep!" the Coach offers ways for the Possibilitator to stay in Radical Relating.

      If the Coach detects that the Possibilitator is not challenged enough, the Coach can intervene and request that the Client increases their 'Sleezy Gremlin Factor' from a level of Intensity 3, to, say, Intensity 7, and see how the Possibilitator handles that.

      Practice this for 10 minutes per person, then get into new 3 person groups and Practice again to Notice similarities and differences. Share what you learn with the other Possibility Team members.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, stay Centered in your 5 Bodies. Keep hyper-aware of what you are doing with your 5 Centers (Except when driving your car! While driving, please do NOT practice these exercises!) It is valuable to acknowledge that if someone else has your Center, you gave it to them. No one can take your Center from you. Each time you notice yourself being adaptive, playing small, not speaking out, trying to please someone else, being uncentered, immediately go to the person you gave your Center to and say, for example,"I am sorry. I gave you my Physical, Intellectual, Energetic, Emotional, or Archetypal Center. It means I am being adaptive towards you, which means I am not here to co-create with you. I am now taking my Center back." Spin around 360 degrees and then say, "Let's start over. Hello!" Make clear notes in your Beep! Book about what you give your Centers to the most in your life.

      After reporting what you learned to your Possibility Team about what you learned by havigating your 5 Centers for 7 days, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.16 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #17 S.H.I.T. SAYS YOU ARE NOT AN ANIMAL, YOU ARE A 'SON OF GOD', SO THE EARTH BELONGS TO YOU TO CONSUME. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS YOU ARE PART OF GAIA - THE CONSCIOUS ECOSYSTEM FIELD OF EARTH - AND YOU ARE MORE PROTECTED, ALIVE, AND CAPABLE WHEN YOU STAY 'GROUNDED' BY CONNECTING YOUR ENERGETIC CENTER TO THE CENTER OF GAIA.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.17

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) about being alive on Earth by studying the Become Gaia and First Position websites and doing the Experiments together.

      With your new Clarity, explain to someone, "I used to think that I lived on Earth, and that the Earth and its resources are ours to use up. I used to think that I am a citizen of a country, or a member of a culture or religion or political party. I used to think that by buying Apple phones and computers I was valued for providing them with brand fidelity. I used to think that my university degree earned me some kind of respect from the Universe..."

      PART 2: Take turns to say something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State by realizing that when I use modern society as my basis, I am merely a pawn in other people's gameworlds. Earth is not our planet to use. Buckminster Fuller was wrong about that. We are not passengers on 'Spaceship Earth'. No. We are the Earth. My Grounding Cord is my personal two-way connection with Gaia. When I use the center of the Earth as my defining identity, I jack-in to nonmaterial resources that have more value than money can buy. By staying Grounded I can provide these resources as services for healing and initiation in ways against which modern culture cannot compete. "

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment in groups of 3. One person is the Client who sits directly across from the Possibilitator who has a Coach at their side. To begin, the Coach asks the Client to hand over their Beep! Book so the Coach can write down what Gaia tells them through the Possibilitator. The Coach also checks that the Possibilitator has their Energetic Center on their Physical Center so they are Centered, and that they have clicked their 'Clicker (snapped their fingers while pulsing a tension in their own diaphragm) to Declare a Grounding Cord that goes from their Center down into the Center of Earth. The Grounding Cord should be about 30 millimeters in diameter (1.5 inches). It is resilient and flexible (not brittle or rigid), and it has a color. The Coach says, "At the count of 3, please tell me the color of your Grounding Cord. One. Two. Three!" The Possibilitator reports the color of their Grounding Cord. Meanwhile, the Client reaches deep into themselves to find a true Question, an authentic Necessity they have. Then they ask this of the Possibilitator. For example, "Would you please ask Gaia if She would clarify my next steps along the Path?" Or, "What would build the kind of Matrix I most need now?" Or, "In which project would I be most useful to Gaia?" Or, "What book do I need to read next to build my Inner Structure?" Or, "Where is my core Team, and how can I connect with them?" Without hesitating, the Possibilitator allows Gaia to respond up their Grounding Cord and out their mouth. The Possibilitator says what Gaia answers directly to the Client without any interpretations. The Possibilitator may not agree with or understand what Gaia says, but they say it anyway as a service to both Gaia and the Client. The Coach writes every word that the Gaia says to the Client into the Client's Beep! Book. Continue this 'Gaian Q and A' for about 10 minutes per person. Then rotate to the next chair and repeat, until each person has participated in each role.

      PART 4: During this next 7 days, set aside 15 minutes of private time first thing in the morning each day to check in with Gaia yourself. Start the session by making sure you have placed your energetic Center on your Physical Center, and then Declaring your Grounding Cord. Say the color of your Grounding cord out loud, to no one. Then take a deep breath, and say out loud, "Hello Gaia! I love you! What do you have for me today?" Then write down in your Beep! Book whatever she says to you. Do not stop to think. Now is the time to write. Then immediately say, "Anything else?" Write that down too. Then say, "Thank you Gaia! I'll talk with you tomorrow!"

      After reading your Beep! Book notes from Gaia to your Possibility Team, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.17 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #18 S.H.I.T. SAYS WHOEVER HAS THE BIGGEST WEAPONS CAN DOMINATE AND RULE ALL THE OTHERS, CAN INVADE YOUR SPACE AND TAKE WHAT THEY WANT. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS BY CLICKING YOUR 'CLICKER' YOU CAN DECLARE AN ENERGETIC BUBBLE OF YOUR OWN PERSONAL SPACE, CLEAN IT OUT, SET YOUR OWN CONTEXT WITH CLARITY AND POSSIBILITY, AND BE SOVEREIGN.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.18

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) about Space and Context by reading through the Become Bubbled and Evolution Of Relating and Set Context websites and doing the Experiments together.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other how, "I used to have no awareness at all about Space. I used to enmesh into other people's personal Spaces to feel connected and safer because this is how I could control them better. I don't know how to be myself or have my own personal Bubble Of Space. I thought if I was vulnerable and unprotected, then the government would take care of me. Isn't that what the government is for?"

      PART 2: Take turns to say something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State by realizing that when I try to avoid responsibility for my own Space, I behave like a child, ripe for betrayal and abuse. I do not have to be naive to be alive. I can take Radical Responsibility for my own Bubble Of Space, clean it out from all the Voices, Assumptions, and Expectations from society and the world around me, and start over as an Adult. Then I can set my own Context and relate to the world and with others as myself, without being enmeshed in their Bubble. I can connect through my Bubble and their Bubble and still remain sovereign in the world, making Proposals and Negotiating Intimacies."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment in groups of 3. One person is the Client who stands directly across from the Possibilitator and interacts as themselves in a converstion. NOTE: It will be more powerful to do this Practice standing together rather than sitting down. The Possibilitator's job is to start by using their Clicker to Declare their Personal Bubble of Space, to clean out their Bubble by reaching into their energetic Bag Of Things and pull out a large golden pearl of their own concentrated energy and information collected from all time and all space, hold their Pearl over their head outside their Bubble, drop their Pearl so it enters through the Bubble, goes down their spine, hits their Physical/Energetic Center and explodes, filling up and flushing out their 5 Bodies and their personal Bubble Of Space, with any extra going down their Grounding Cord into the Earth. Thus, in one simple move, their 5 Bodies and their personal Bubble Of Space is cleansed of foreign energies and filled with their own energy and information.

      From this 'start over' fresh condition, the Possibilitator clicks their Clicker again to establish their grounded Golden Cube of Workspace that includes the Client, and clicks again to Set the Context of that Workspace (their preferred level of Responsibility and Bright Principles). The Coach checks that all this is done and working, then says, "Go!" and the Possibilitator starts a conversation with the Client while still keeping their personal Bubble Of Space and holding the Workspace Context. Part of the conversation can be about explaining to the Client about the Possibilitator's Workspace, and inviting the Client to enter the Workspace if they want to, without being Adaptive.

      The Coach's job is to keep making sure the Possibilitator maintains their Center, Grounding Cord, and Bubble, has their Sword Of Clarity to hand guarding the qualities of their Workspace. This is called First Position in Possibility Mangement, the 'ready state' of a Possibilitator. Then the Client can complain, or blame, or resent, and the Possibilitator resiliently Holds Space, with the Coach giving ongoing Feedback and Coaching. Practice this for 10 minutes, then stop, rotate roles, and start again, until everyone has a chance to Practice all 3 roles.

      PART 4: During this next 7 days, step out of bed in the morning with your Center and your Grounding Cord into your personal Bubble Of Space (First Position of a Possibilitator), then never leave the Bubble. If at any moment you notice yourself being adaptive or being without your Center, Grounding Cord, or Bubble Of Space, instantly get them back. (Again, PLEASE do NOT practice this while driving a car. When you have Built Matrix enough for First Position to integrate into your Being, it will naturally occur while driving. But while driving, keep your Attention on driving. Thank you.)

      Learning First Position is like learning to ride a bicycle. In the beginning, what you will most often do is crash. Try. Crash. Start over. Crash. Get Hooked. Start over. Crash. Brush yourself off. Start over again. Crash... As you learn, Notice what changes in your world. Write and publish a short Article about two people, one who is Adaptive and one who lives in First Position. Neither is 'right', but the quality of their lives are different. Read your Article to your Possibility Team.

      After reading your Article to your Possibility Team, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.18 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please enter the link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #19 S.H.I.T. SAYS YOU SHOULD SIT IN ROWS, TAKE NOTES, FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS, AND ALWAYS BE WORRIED ABOUT YOUR GRADES. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS YOU HAVE A REAL VOICE FOR SAYING "STOP!" "NO!" FOR MAKING BOUNDARIES AND SAYING WHAT YOU WANT AND WHAT YOU DON'T WANT.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.19

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) about speaking out with your Voice by reading through the Real Voice website and doing the Experiments together.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other how, "I used to not like my voice. Whenever I spoke out, I would be in trouble. I would get punished. People would argue with me and make me wrong. I don't like my voice anyway. It is too screetchy, too quiet. Nobody listens to me anyway. Why should I speak. There is always someone louder and more obnoxious who wants to speak out. I hide in the shadows and stay safe."

      PART 2: Take turns to say something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State from realizing that I have a Real Voice. It is my Voice, a unique Voice. My Voice needs to be heard because if I don't say what I have to say, then it will not be heard because no one else can say it. I cannot be represented in a 'representative government'. My Voice is connected to my Being, to my Archetypal Resources, and to my Underworld where I can see and name what is really going on behind the scenes. I use my Voice to land Distinctions and Possibilities in Spaces, and to put the shit on the table so that something different can happen. Not speaking out equates to not living, and now it is my time to live!"

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment in groups of 3. One person is the Client who sits directly across from the Possibilitator and keeps asking the Possibilitator, "What do you want to say?" and then listens. The Coach coaches the Possibilitator about being Authentic, meaning that what they are saying comes from themselves as an Adult, not from their beliefs, their parents, or society. The Possibilitator might even begin to speak from their Bright Principles, their Archetypal Lineage, or their Dragon.

      However, it is more likely that the Possibilitator will encounter an Energetic Block against speaking out with their Real Voice. They will hesitate, go Liquid, leave their body, or feel traumatized if they are asked to speak Authentically. What is up? It is fear triggering an old decision from childhood, or triggering a Past Life Vow to never speak out again. Many times people choose to stay quiet because they don't want to make a mess, thinking, "It would be simpler if I don't say anything... I can get by not saying anything..." But is that true? Is it simpler in the long run? Do you really get by?

      In this case, the Coach should immediately change roles into being the Spaceholder for that Emotional Healing Process (EHP). Immediately after the EHP, ask the Possibilitator to speak in their Real Voice for at least a few minutes, just to have the joy on the other side of their EHP. Spend 20-40 minutes on each Possibilitator, and then change roles until everyone has had a chance to Practice speaking with their Real Voice.

      PART 4: During this next 7 days, cut loose with your Real Voice at least 3 times each day. This does not mean you need to shout, but... shouting could happen. After all, you are speaking the Real, and the Real can be loud. Remember the Third Rule: Do Not Get Arrested.

      After 2 or 3 days Practicing, the next 3 times you cut loose with your Real Voice, pull out your phone and ask someone to film you up close. Show these films at your next Possibility Team meeting. Consider the possibility that each time you use your Real Voice, the contents of what you say could be important enough to warrant being written into an Article. Write the Article.

      After 7 days of using your Real Voice at least 3 times per day, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.19 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please give the links to your Real Voice videos and your published Articles. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #20 S.H.I.T. SAYS YOU SHOULD CHASE THE CLOCK AND BE WORRIED ABOUT NOT HAVING ENOUGH TIME. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS YOU CAN MINIMIZE YOUR 'NOW' AND RECLAIM YOUR POWER TO CREATE BY LEAVING BEHIND THE FANTASY WORLD THAT YOU CAN CHANGE THE PAST OR THE FUTURE.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.20

      You cannot change what happened to you.

      Why? Because it already happened.

      Try this: Do not have sat down just now. Can you do this? No.

      Why not? Because you are already in the chair.

      You cannot change something even if it happened only one second in the past.

      Your Agency is located in the Present Moment.

      Power can only be applied NOW.

      The question is, how big is your NOW?

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) about time by reading through the Minimize NOW and Make Time websites and doing the Experiments together.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other how, "I used to think that the past was threat my present. I used to think I could change the future so things would be better now. I used to think that being on time meant chasing the clock around to arrive somewhere at the same time the second hand of the clock arrived there. I have been a victim of not having enough time!"

      PART 2: Take turns to say something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State by recognizing that I cannot change what happened to me, BUT I CAN CHANGE MY RELATIONSHIP to what happened to me. Changing my relationship to what happened to me can only happen NOW. What is the relationship to what happened to me made of? Stories. My Story about what happened to me is all that I have NOW from whatever happened to me before, or whatever I imagine about what might happen to me in the future. It is my story about it. That is what I carry. I may think I carry unexpressed emotions about what happened to me, but the only reason I can still find these unexpressed emotions is because I still carry my unexamined Story. Who made up that Story in the first place? Me. If I am using a Story created by someone else, who decided to use that Story? Me. Changing my Story about what happened to me begins with Minimizing my NOW."
      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment in groups of 3. One person is the Client who sits directly across from the Possibilitator and asks them, "What happened to you in the past that you are afraid of might happen again?" The Coach coaches the Possibilitator for staying in First Position and using their Real Voice, and also catches Doorways to EHPs so the Possibilitator can write them into the back pages of their Beep! Book to be easily found next time an EHP is possible for them. Go for 20 minutes per person, then switch roles until everyone has a chance to Minimize their NOW and extract themselves from their past and their future.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, interact with the world for 3 hours straight each day using a NOW that is no bigger than dropping a small stone to the floor. (Again: NOT while you are driving a car...) That falling time is the only time you could catch the stone and stop it from hitting the floor. That is how small to shrink your NOW down to: less than 3 seconds. Each time you expand your NOW into considerations about what happened to you in the past, and each time you expand your NOW into considerations about what might happen to you in the future, stop and reach into your wallet and put the equivalent of 1 Euro in your other pocket. Each time you see a busker or beggar on the street, simply reach into that other pocket and put all its contents into their hat.

      After keeping your NOW shrunk for 3 hours straight for 7 days in a row, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.20 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field enter the amount of cash you donated to a beggar or a busker this week due to this Experiment. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #21 S.H.I.T SAYS IF YOU ARE BREATHING AND THINKING YOU ARE ALIVE. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS YOUR BEING IS FED THROUGH BEING PRESENT IN 5-BODIES WHEN NOTICING WHAT IS, AND WHEN EXPERIENCING LOVE HAPPENING.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.21

      The 'problem' with Being Present in your 5 Bodies is that you will start to Feel and Notice things that your childhood Survival Strategy was blocking you from feeling and noticing in order to keep everything the same in your life. If you are not okay with consciously feeling your Feelings and Emotions, of if your are not okay with Noticing what other people are NOT Noticing, then your unconscious Fears will throw you back into the center of mainstream Zombie culture.

      It can help you to escape from the stories in your mind that keep restimulationg your unconscious fears if you Minimize your NOW and Become Present.

      Stories are fictions.

      Stories are about you and other people in the past or future, about what happened already or what might happen soon, what could have been different, etc.

      Stories exist in time.

      In a Minimized NOW, there is no time.

      A Minimized NOW is too small for Stories.

      All of a sudden you enter Presence. What a fine place this is!

      No more Voices nagging at you in your head. No more self terrorizing to keep you small and disempowered.

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) about being an alive Human Being by reading through the Become Present and Live Full Out websites and doing the Experiments.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other how, "I used to think that I was alive and present just like everyone else, and it turned out to be horrifyingly true. I am running on automatic, sleep walking through life, just like everyone else. I stay numb and mechanically do what I am told in order to survive, just like everyone else. Nobody shows me anything different. Everyone looks the same to me, nearly dead from boredom. Nothing ever changes."

      PART 2: Take turns to say something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State by discovering that I can Minimimize my NOW and Become Present. The past and future fade into the background as I show up, here and now, and cause things. My power has agency in the Present moment. Only in the Present can I make decisions, take actions, say Yes or No, say Stop or Go, change my mind, start over, invent, renegotiate, make proposals, try Experiments, play full out, look somewhere else, clean things out, try again. It all happens now. When I inhabit my bodies I feel what my 5 Bodies are screaming at me. I am alive! I am alive! With fears, angers, sadnesses and joys. Not just a few, but an abundance of sensations, information pouring in, resources for life. Love only happens in the Present. So much matters to me in the Present."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment in groups of 3. One person is the Client who sits directly across from the Possibilitator and reads them the following words: (CLIENT NOTE: You may not need to read the whole thing for each person for them to Become Present. If they start showing up, stop reading, listen well, and Hold Space for them.) (COACH NOTE: It is possible that the Possibilitator could enter an emotional state such as at the beginning of an EHP, but don't go there. Instead, pause, have them write the emotion and the triggering memory at the back of their Beep! Book for later, the return to Presence where there is no Story.) "Each of your 5 Bodies has its own set of very special and useful sensations in the Present. At first it may feel overwhelming to see so much and experience such intensity. An expanded NOW keeps your Numbness Bar high so you generalize yourself into a fog. But in the Present, sounds become enormous. Smells impinge on your senses. The lives of little insects and birds start mattering to you. You care immensely about unfairness and disrespect betewen people. Please be Present with me. I am listening. Please tell me how it is for you to be Present. Don't worry. You are not going crazy. The world really is like this. It always has been and it always will be. You numbed yourself and shut down your senses to try to pretend to 'be normal' to be accepted by the people around you. But now you can plug directly in to Reality. In order to gain Agency as a Possibilitator you require an accurate assessment of current reality. With a little practice you will get used to the immensity and Immediacy of life happening inside of you and around you. You are learning to Navigate real life."

      As Jonathan Livingston Seagull might say, "We begin with level flight..."

      After 30 minutes, come to a pause, stand up, move around into a new chair, sit down, then start over. Do this until each person has experienced a safe space in which to be Present.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, practice entering the state of Presence for 30 minutes 3 times each day. Start with a pause. Notice that you are breathing, hearing sounds, feeling sensations in your physical body, the air temperature and humidity, the breeze, the movement of other people and things with respect to your current location. Then hold your hand out palm down in front of you. Keep it there for no Reason. Let everything else you might imagine fall away. There you are with your hand held out flat in front of you, motionless. Whenever you are ready, turn your hand palm up, again for no Reason. Notice your Grounding Cord, your Bubble, your energetic Center on your physical Center. Life is actually this simple. Keep breathing. Go where Presence brings you. Keep enjoying the vastness and nothingness of Presence. Make notes in your Beep! Book, and at the end of the week, write a short Article about what you discover by being Present.

      After enjoying the Present for 1 hour a day for 7 days in a row, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.21 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please give the link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #22 S.H.I.T. SAYS THAT FEELINGS ARE BAD AND DANGEROUS, AND IF YOU HAVE THEM YOU CAN BE CURED WITH ANTIDEPRESSANT DRUGS. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS CONSCIOUS FEELINGS ARE A NEUTRAL AND VITAL SOURCE OF INTELLIGENCE AND ENERGY FOR HEALING AND CREATING.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.22

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) about your Feelings by reading through the Conscious Feelings and Numbness Bar and Feelings Form websites and doing the Experiments together. With your new Clarity, explain to someone, "I used to have no awareness at all about what to do with my feelings except try to avoid them and pretend to be numb."

      PART 2: Take turns to say something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State. I Notice that I can develop skills for Inner Navigating my Conscious Feelings:

      1. Conscious Anger is for making boundaries and distinctions, starting things, stopping things, saying "No!" or "Yes!" or "Stop!" or "Go!"
      2. Concious Sadness is for accepting change, being with, letting go, apologizing, being vulnerable, listening, or getting Present.
      3. Conscious Fear is for detecting potential danger, making and keeping agreements, taking intelligent risks, planning, Noticing, and exploring the Unknown.
      4. Conscious Joy is for being generous, celebrating, appreciation, sharing my discoveries, inclusion, and Playing Full Out. "

      I am Noticing that whenever I am Centered and Present in my 5 Bodies, I start to feel. My Feelings may be ABOUT someone else, but they are FOR me. Feelings provide information and energy for a Free And Natural Adult!

      Emotions are for healing.

      Feelings are for creating."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment in groups of 3. One person is the Coach, who sits to the side of the Possibilitator and coaches the Possibilitator's Spaceholding. The Possibilitator sits directly across from the Client and says, "Please please gently lower your Numbness Bar and do a Low Intensity Feelings Check-In with me (less than 10% intense) and use the Feelings Form:"

      "I feel _____% (angry / sad / glad / scared)."

      "Because _____."

      "I want _____,"

      "So I will _____."

      For example, the Client might say:

      "I feel 7% angry..."

      "Because the sun is shining in my eyes from that window."

      "I want to see you better and not be so blinded by the sun..."

      "So I will go pull the curtain closed over the window."

      Then she goes and closes the window curtain.

      Or the Client might say:

      "I feel 9% scared of you..."

      "Because I have the Story that you are a man who thinks I am stupid."

      "I want to be able to be Present with you..."

      "So I will ask you now to please tell me what Story you have about me."

      Then she asks and the Possibilitator answers.

      Notice that while sharing feelings, no one can be wrong.

      Give everyone 15 to 20 minutes each to practice using the Feelings Form, especially with all 4 Feelings.

      PART 4: During the next 7 days, use the Feelings Form with Low Level Feelings (less than 10% intene Feelings) at least 3 times each day, also inviting the person you are communicating with to use the Feelings Form back with you. Actually do whatever it is your Feelings are telling you to do, unless what your Feelings tell you to do seems illegal, immoral, or fattening, in which case it is probably not Feelings but Gremlin Emotions you are Feeling. In that case, write the Emotion and the action in the back of your Beep! Book and take them directly to your Gremlin Transformation Team. Report to your next Possibility Team any miracles that happened during the week.

      After lowering your Numbness Bar and using Low Level Feelings to exchange the Feelings Form with 3 different people per day for 7 days, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.22 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #23 S.H.I.T. SAYS WHOEVER IS MOST OFFENDED WINS, EVEN AT THE UNITED NATIONS LEVEL. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS THAT REACTIVITY COMES FROM A BUTTON, A HOOK, A TRIGGER, A TRAUMA, A VOICE IN YOUR HEAD, OR AN IMBALANCE, AND IF YOU ARE REACTING YOU ARE NOT PRESENT.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.23

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) about Emotional Reactivity while you study and do the Experiments together on the Box Mechanics, Reactivity, and Become Unhookable websites. With your new Clarity, explain to someone, "I used to think that emotional reactivity was beyond comprehension. I thought those people are out of control, immature, stupid, wreckless, and slowing everything down. The world has to stop to make sure they have a pacifier and a bottle... And when I go postal, I really need something, and the whole world needs to stop until I have what I need."

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State from realizing that Reactivity is a childhood Survival Strategy. There are 6 kinds of Reactivity, each with a way to eliminate it:

      1. Buttons: A 'Button' is a design feature of the Box. To eliminate a Button involves changing the structure of the Box through a Liquid State Emotional Healing Process (EHP) where you go back to the moment you installed that particular Reactivity in your Box and making a different choice about how to handle what is going on.
      2. Hooks: A 'Hook' is thrown out by someone's Gremlin to attract your Gremlin to participate in a 'Gremlin Feeding Frenzy'. To change your Gremlin's Diet, the most effective way is to participate in the Gremlin Transformation Program.
      3. Triggers: A person gets 'triggered' into 5 days to 2 weeks of inexplicable secluded depression when they say a 'Trigger Phrase' to themselves that opens the door to their internal energy Café so the Vampire Entities can swarm in and feed. Then when they have gorged themselves, they fall asleep and the seclusion is over. Ending this cycle requires you Shifting Identity to become a Trigger Hunter. No one can capture your Trigger Phrases for you. On the other hand, no one can stop you from capturing the Trigger Phrases yourself. This Process is explained in detail and includes a script in S.P.A.R.K.135 and also in the Trigger Hunter website.
      4. Traumas: A 'trauma' is an incomplete or unexpressed Emotion stuck in the 5 Bodies. Whenever something in the Present resonates with the incomplete Emotion, the incomplete Emotion gets activated even though the Emotion has nothing to do with what is happening in the Present. The most effective way to Complete Incomplete Emotions is through straightforward Emotional Healing Processes (EHP) as delivered online or in-person by Possibility Coaches.
      5. Voices: A Voice in your head can cause you to react Emotionally with strong opinions, Prejudices, Projections, Judgments, Excuses, Conclusions, Resentment, Revenge, etc. Such Voices usually originate in the Parent Egostate and can be eliminated simply and effectivey by conscious use of your Voice Blaster, one of a Possibilitator's 13 energetic Tools. No one can shoot a Voice for you. More intestingly, no one can stop you from shooting Voices.
      6. Imbalances: Each of your 5 Bodies needs it own kind of care. It needs food, air, water, vitamins and minerals, proteins, sleep, attention, acknowledgement, love, touch, sunlight, creation challenges, exercise, connection with Archetypal resources, valuable work, etc. If ever these elements are in scarcity or over abundance, any of the 5 Bodies can get enough out of balance to cause Emotional Reactivity. Learning the causes and cures for your 5 Bodies' Imbalances and Practicing within those limits keeps you online.

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment in groups of 3. All 3 of you be Radically Honest and write down your typical Emotional Reactivity in your Beep! Book, especially the Reactivity you suppress, and how you suppress them. For example, if you tend towards depression, how do you hide or distract yourself from being depresse? Your behaviors that distract you from Reactivity are just as reactive as your Reactivity. After 20 minutes of writing, place the chairs with 2 facing 'The Chosen One'. The Chosen One reads what they wrote, while the 2 Possibilitators use Radical Relating to help them add deeper clarity and 'transformational dangerousness' to their Self Observations. After 10 or 15 minutes, rotate roles so that everyone gets to be The Chosen One.

      PART 4: During the next 7 days, continue to monitor your own Emotional Reactivity. At the same time, notice any groups you are in which are hampered by the Emotional Reactivity of its members. Make a formal Proposal to that group that you study this Archan Thoughtware Upgrade #23 together and Practice any of the relevant 6 Reactivity Healing Processes to unlock your abilities to Creatively Collaborate as a group.

      After reporting any miracle recoveries from Emotional Reactivity to your Possibility Team , please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.23 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #24 S.H.I.T. SAYS IF YOUR THERAPIST HELPS YOU UNDERSTAND WHAT HAPPENED, THEN YOU WILL BE CURED. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS CONSCIOUSLY NAVIGATED EMOTIONS ARE A GATEWAY TO EMOTIONAL HEALING PROCESSES (EHP) WHICH CHANGE THE SHAPE OF YOUR BEING AND CREATE A NEW FUTURE FOR YOU.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.24

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) about Emotions while you study and do the Experiments together on the 4 Emotions, Process, and Emotional Healing Process (EHP) websites. With your new Clarity, explain to someone,"I used to think that Emotions and Feelings were the same - bad. If I started to express them I thought I would be put into a mental hospital under heavy brain drugs."

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State from Noticing that I can develop Inner Navigation skills that help other people learn to Navigate their own Feelings and Emotions. Feelings are for Creating. Emotions are for Healing. Being able to provide EHPs to Edgeworkers is part of my Nonmaterial Value that I can offer to the Village. Every EHP I do for myself gives me greater skills for delivering EHPs for others. I never realized that learning to Consciously Feel had so many transformationally valuable healing applications, and at the same time could create so much High Level Fun!"

      Then write down whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment in groups of 3. One person is the Coach, who sits to the side of the Possibilitator and coaches the Possibilitator's Spaceholding. The Possibilitator sits directly across from the Client, reaches out to shake their hand, and says, "What can I do for you?" One of the most straightforward EHPs to deliver and also the most commonly needed is to remove an Energetic Block. If providing an EHP is new for you, consider offering that specific EHP to you Client. A script for this Process is in the Energetic Block website. The Coach offers real-time "Go! Beep! Shift! Go!" to the Possibilitator. You are all on the same Team, trying to learn how EHPs go, because they are invaluable, and you do not already know how to do them. Go for about 30 minutes with each Client, then rotate roles until everyone has had a chance to receive, deliver, and coach an EHP. Bravo!

      PART 4: Start by titling a new page at the back of your Beep! Book: MY EMOTIONS. For the next 7 days, Notice each and every Emotion that arises in you, even if less than 10% intense. For example, write: "I feel afraid that I chose the longest line in the grocery store and someone will see me stupidly wasting my time." Or, "I feel angry because that guy just dropped his cigarette butt on the sidewalk not caring that this is his town, thinking that some slave like me will pick it up for him." Or, "I feel sad because no one actually knows what it is like for me inside of me. No one cares enough to ask me what is going on, or to listen to me." Then twice during this week, choose one of the Emotions you wrote down and use it as a Doorway for an Emotional Healing Process (EHP) that you arrange to do in the Emotional Healing Collaboration Group on Telegram, or at an online or in-person EHP Dojo, or with your 3Cell, or with a Possibility Coach, or with a Feelings Practitioner, or with a fellow Possibilitator. Be sure to share the Gold that you discover in your EHPs online so that the whole Village can benefit. For one of your EHPs, write and publish an Article about your transformational adventure.

      After you publish your Article, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.24 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please give the link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #25 S.H.I.T. SAYS "YOU ARE WHAT YOU ARE!" AND EITHER YOU HAVE A 'GOOD JOB' OR YOU ARE A FAILURE. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS YOU BUILT YOUR INNER STRUCTURE THE WAY IT IS IN ORDER TO SURVIVE, THEREFORE, YOU CAN REBUILD YOUR INNER STRUCTURE ANY WAY YOU WANT - INCLUDING TO HAVE ABSURDLY EFFECTIVE AGENCY.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.25

      School could be centered around building your Inner Structure, but it is not. Therefore it is probable that you do not realize that you need a resilient Inner Structure to be prepared for your Authentic Adulthood Initiatory Processes. You also need a clear and efficient Inner Structure to reclaim and navigate your personal Authority and your Conscious Will, especially when you Take A Stand, participate in a Bridgehouse, or build a Gameworld.

      An unexamined Inner Structure diminishes your interactions with the Universe to Zombie-like numb, unconscious, knee-jerk Survival-based reactions. If you are unable to create anything other than this - and if that pisses you off enough - you may be ready to start consciously rebuilding your Inner Structure.

      This sort of inner reconstruction work is best done in a consistent, long-term meeting space specifically held for that purpose, such as a 3Cell or a Possibility Team.

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of the Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) that is woven into your Inner Structure by studying and doing the Experiments together in the Memetics, Memetic Engineering, and Inner Structure websites.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"I used to think that how my awareness worked was born with me. It seems like most people start off stupid or smart and they never change. Someone who is irresponsible and slow stays irresponsible and slow. That's all there is to it."

      PART 2: Take turns to say something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State which comes from realizing that my Inner Structure is mine to play with and make into whatever I want. I incapacitated myself to Survive. Now I can unleash the torrent of my Being and Live. I could become absurdly effective with Inner Navigating my Inner Structure, allowing me to create results beyond what I might currently be able to imagine. The design and contents of my Inner Structure matters immensely in terms of the quality of my life. In the same way that I might Scan a group of people to find the right person to do a particular job, my Inner Structure empowers or disimpowers me to have competence and Agency in Relating, Noticing, evolving, Inventing, discovering, formulating, or causing things to occur. By wrestling to become aware of my Inner Structure, I can also evolve it, remove crusty barriers and add delightful elegance."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment sitting in groups of 3. All 3 of you in Radically Honesty title a new page in your Beep! Book as 'MY MEMES', then write down as best you can the Memes of your Inner Structure. To find the Memes of your Inner Structure, you could start by writing down the Memes of our mother and your father. Here is where the Radical Honesty comes in. You might know of a Meme from your father, for example, such as 'Having a job is the way to live', and you might not like it, so you think you do not have that Meme. But! You are just as controlled by fighting against a Meme as by following it! So... write it down!

      After 20 minutes, arrange your chairs in the formation of a Client facing a Possibilitator, with a Coach off to the side of the Possibilitator. Then the Client says to the Possibilitator, "I have chosen one of my Memes that I would like to change. Would you please be my Spaceholder for this?"

      The Possibilitator says... whatever they want to, of course. But could say, "Yes, I will be Spaceholder for you. What is the Meme you would like to change?"

      The Client clarifies the Meme they want to change.

      The Possibilitator says, "Please close your eyes. Please make sure you are in First Position. Take a deep breath, and then tell me the first moment you ever remember having or using this Meme. What was happening in your life then?"

      The Client may have emotions that accompany their memories, but we are not going there this time. When they tell you the specific urgency facing them for which adopting this Meme seemed like the solution, ask them to click their Clicker and go 2 hours further back in time, back to a time when they did not have that Meme in their Inner Structure. Then ask the Client to describe to you how their life was for them then.

      After a while, the Possibilitator asks, "Would you like to bring this previous Inner Structure without that particular Meme into your life now?"

      If the Client says, "Yes, I would like that."

      Then the Possibilitator says, "Okay. At the count of three, grab your Inner Structure from back then, click your Clicker, time jump around the difficult time, and come back here with your Inner Structure intact. One. Two. Three. Go!"

      The Client clicks their Clicker and bypasses the installation of the bothersome Meme.

      Then the Possibilitator says, "Wonderful! Please take a deep breath and open your eyes... Hello! Welcome back to 2026! (or whatever year it is). Since you adopted that old Meme for a circumstance that no longer exists, you don't need it anymore. You left it back there and now have an Inner Structure better suited to your current situation. Congratulations!"

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, become a Meme Researcher. Start by titling a new page in your Beep! Book 'MY MEMES'. A Meme is the smallest instruction for the design of your Intellectual Body... your mind, in the same way that a Gene is the smallest design instruction for the design of your Physical Body. Each of your Memes has a Purpose. Where did your Memes come from? How does each one serve you? Oddly enough, you will proceed best by first Noticing and documenting other people's Memes. We have discovered that by writing down what you detect about the Inner Structure of others, you discover your own Inner Structure. Sit in a shopping mall or business district and capture 100 Memes from others. You can see what they think by what they say, do, don't say, or don't do. Put a small circle in front of each Meme that you also have. Put an 'X' mark in front if you have a different Meme. If you have a different Meme, write down what your Meme is in comparison. Then build your list to 100 of your own Memes. Format your list of 100 Memes into an Article and post it online. Share what you wrote with your Possibility Team.

      After uploading your Article, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.25 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please give the link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #26 S.H.I.T. SAYS THE WORLD IS LIKE IT IS AND RUNS LIKE IT RUNS, SO DEAL WITH IT. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS HUMAN BEINGS INTERACT WITH EACH OTHER THROUGH FIELDS OF COMMITMENT CALLED 'GAMEWORLDS'. YOU CAN CREATE AND PARTICIPATE IN ANY KIND OF GAMEWORLD YOU WANT.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.26

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) about Gameworlds by studying the Gameworld Theory and Gameworld Builder websites.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"I used to think that modern culture was true, the best thing that human beings ever invented. I used to think that the elements of modern culture - the gas station, the government, working at a corporation, television commercials - are the only solution to life."

      PART 2: Take turns to say something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State which comes from realizing that human beings interact with each other through Gameworlds. Modern Culture is only a Gameworld built out of other Gameworlds. When I take responsibility for being a human being, I take responsibility for promoting the Values of every Gameworld I participate in. Otherwise, I am one of the Zombies who is not aware of the Values of the Gameworlds I participate in... I might soon be choosing to participate in different Gameworlds. I might start building the more beautiful culture my heart knows is possible."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment sitting in groups of 3. Spend 15 minutes writing in your Beep! Book on a new page titled: 'MY GAMEWORLD'. There you describe a Gamewold you would love to build and Navigate with your friends. It does not matter for this exercise what the Gameworld is, so why not take a little risk and start designing a Gameworld that is a little bigger and riskier than your Box might want to. A Gameworld has a written 'Codex' that explains the 'Rules of Engagement' of the Gameworld, in other words, how it works in the Gameworld. The Codex also contains a description of the Context of the Gameworld, in other words, the Gameworld's relationship to Responsibility, such as No Responsibility, Child Level Responsibility, Adolescent Level Responsibility, Adult Responsibility, High Level Responsibility, or Radical Responsibility. The Codex also has the Name of the Gameworld. After the 15 minutes, change the chairs around so 2 Possibilitators face the Chosen One. The Chosen One explains their Gameworld to the 2 Possibilitators, who ask questions of refinement and make proposals for improvements and clarifications. After 15 minutes, change roles so the next person is the Chosen One until all people have gotting to deepen the design of their Gameworld.

      PART 4: During the next 7 days, carefully document all the Gameworlds you support through your daily life. All of them... Make a complete and impartial list in your Beep! Book titled 'MY GAMEWORLDS'. Next to each Gameworld, write 3 to 5 of the Values that are at the heart of each Gameworld, driving it onwards, leaving whatever tracks it may. These are the Values you support by participating in that Gameworld. Choose one of the Gameworlds that you are not happy about supporting. Call together a 3Cell of 2 other Possibilitators to support you making a precise and powerful Gameplan for completely extracting yourself from that Gameworld, forever. Follow your plan to completion with the Unreasonably intense Pirate support of your 3Cell. Write and publish an Article titled something like: 'How I Am Escaping From The Patriarchy'. Share your Article with your Possibility Team.

      After publishing your Article, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.26 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please give the link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #27 S.H.I.T. SAYS ANYONE WHO TAKES RESPONSIBILITY IS AN IDIOT, WHOEVER AVOIDS THE MOST RESPONSIBILITY SUCCEEDS. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS WE LIVE IN A RESPONSIBLE UNIVERSE WHERE AN ADULT CAN ALIGN WITH ARCHETYPAL FORCES OF NATURE BY BEING RADICALLY RESPONSIBLE.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.27

      If a child makes a mess, who cleans it up?

      The mother.

      This is Child Level Responsibility.

      Modern culture is making huge messes with no intention at all of ever cleaning them up. This locates modern culture squarely on Child Level Responsibility. Even 'kings' of industry, political 'leaders', 'successful' businessmen, 'respected' religious figures, etc. are uninitiated adolescents. Adult Level Responsibility is beyond the Edge of modern culture. Experimenting at the Edge of modern culture makes you an Edgeworker.

      And yet, there is a Doorway to a transformational way of being called Radical Responsibility, where you take more Responsibility than is reasonable, than is fair, than is visible... you take more Responsibility than is possible. This shift of orientation puts you into a different Space and a different relationship with the Universe.

      This level of Responsibility is called Radical Responsibility.

      Archiarchy is centered on Radical Responsibility. It is an interesting and challenging new Gameplan for your life.

      No one can take Radical Responsibility for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from taking Radical Responsibility.

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) about Responsibility while you study and do the Experiments together on the Radical Responsibility website.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"I used to think that Responsibility was a punishment forced on anyone too stupid to get out of the way. Responsibility is getting put in a firing line and executed. It is paying the bill for everyone else, being a slave of those with power and freedom. The idea of Radical Responsibility is insane self punishment, something like suicide."

      PART 2: Take turns to say something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State which comes from realizing that any culture teaching that irresponsibility equates to success is an irresponsible culture. It is Gremlins empowering more Gremlins to justify their Gremlin existence. Who will clean up the mess? No one... until all life on Earth is baked to dust. "Ha-hah! Who cares?" the Gremlin shouts. But actually, I care. Teaching irresponsibility is irresponsible. School could be about Authentic Adulthood Initiatiatory Processes that build the Matrix in each person's Being to be able to take more and more Responsibility. Then, instead of making melodramatic messes, Human Beings could create magical majesty. No one can stop me from starting over right now! Who's with me?"

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment sitting in groups of 3. The Possibilitator sits across from the Client, and the Coach sits next to the Possibilitator. The Client listens while the Possibilitator researches their life to report about 7 times when they tried to avoid Responsibility and the consequences each one caused in their life. Then 7 times when they tried to take Radical Responsibility and the consequences each one caused in their life. The Coach checks to make sure these stories are not about 'right and wrong' or 'good and bad' but rather about researching consequences and expanding awareness of being or not being in alignment with this Responsible Universe. After all 3 have had a chance in this ultrasafe Space to research personal Responsibility, shift the space into a 10 minute 'Responsibility Spree'. One person takes the role of 'Time Keeper' and shouts, "Go be Radically Responsible for 10 minutes, starting NOW!" How this shows up will be different for each person. Someone might call up their mother and apologize for leaving a particular mess as a child. Someone else might straighten out everyone's shoes that were tossed thoughtlessly at the door. Still another might go clean the stove in the kitchen, or meticulously clean up the dust and hairs from under each person's chair. Nobody asked you to do this. You go down onto your hands and knees with a damp cloth without asking permission, without trying to gain praise by telling someone what you are doing. Just do it. Be it. Be Radically Responsible for handling what you are handling. Become the source of Archetypal impeccability. When the Time Keeper shouts, "Stop!", refuse to stop. You decide when to stop, not the Time Keeper. Share about your view of the world while being Radically Responsible.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, once each day, do an Experiment in Radical Responsibility. Perhaps you grab a shovel and a bucket, walk into the forest, dig up 7 baby trees struggling to get enough sun to survive, and transplant them into new earth. Perhaps you obtain ingredients and make lunch for the people around you even if it is not your turn, even if you do not know them. Tell them you are an Experimenter doing an Experiment in Radical Responsibility. Communicate with them more clearly and helpfully than they have ever experienced before. Whichever result you choose to manifest, do it Radically and Responsibly. Write up and publish your 7 Experiments into an Article for no particular reason. Read your Article at your next Possibility Team meeting.

      After reading your Article to your Possibility Team, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.27 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please give the link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #28 S.H.I.T. SAYS HUMAN CULTURE DEPENDS ON TECHNOLOGICAL INFRASTRUCTURE. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS HUMAN BEINGS HAVE A NATURAL CAPACITY TO CAVITATE, CONTEXTUALIZE, INHABIT, AND NAVIGATE NEW GAMEWORLD SPACES AS ENERGETIC INFRASTRUCTURE THAT NEVER EXISTED BEFORE ON EARTH, WHICH CAN BE FAR MORE SATISFYING THAN MODERN CULTURE.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.28

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) about Space while you study and do the Experiments together on the Cavitate Space, Hold Space, and Navigate Space websites.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"I used to think that all the forms for human interaction have already been discovered and tried. I used to think that my limitations were defined by my circumstances and that I had no options for inventing anything truly inspiring to me."

      PART 2: Then say something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State which comes from realizing that I myself can Consciously Cavitate new Spaces that never existed before on Earth! I can Set the Context of each Space I Cavitate. I can establish the Rules Of Engagement. And I can invite other people into my new Gameworld Spaces and see them be surprised and delighted to unleash and empower new Potentials."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment together sitting in groups of 3. The Possibilitator sits across from the Client, and the Coach sits next to the Possibilitator. The Possibilitator follows the demonstration video on the Cavitation website, then stands up and Cavitates the Space for, and sets the Context for a new Gameworld called a Growness. A Growness is the Archan replacement for a modern culture 'business', but the Purpose is different. The Purpose of a Growness is to create a profit, but in Archiarchy, 'profit' is defined as growth in awareness, expansion of consciousness. If the Possibilitator is not prepared with their own Purpose for their Growness, they can practice by using the Purpose: to practice specialty skills that focus on healing the Gaia / human disconnection on Earth through empowering new Radically Responsible Connection skills. As a Practice, the Possibilitator, Client, and Coach can all Cavitate the new Gamespace together, and step into it together. Give it a Name. There is no Reason for you to ever exit your newly Cavitated Space. You could keep meeting to deepen the Context of your new culture Space, and to deliver your Nonmaterial Value immediately. Provide immensely unfair amounts of real value. If you provide true Value, the Universe will Notice. You will be tilting the balance of Value in your favor, and the Universe will be forced to repay you. If the 3 of you do not join the same Growness, then rotate roles and give each person the time to Cavitate Space for their own Growness.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, Cavitate at least one Say What They Want space each day. Why? Because even if (as it says in Thoughtware Upgrade Experiment #1) BY PAYING ATTENTION TO YOUR ATTENTION YOU CONSERVE ENOUGH ENERGY TO CAUSE WHAT YOU WANT TO CAUSE, you won't be able to cause what you want to cause if you don't know what you want! Make what you want the center of your life. Breathe it. Smile it. Be grateful for it. Expand it. Play in it. Make sure that the 'you' doing the wanting is the Authentic you, not your Gremlin, not your father, not some desperate image of 'financial success'. In reality, what you want is not about you. It is about becoming a Space through which something can serve Healing and the Evolution of Consciousness. At some point, what you want will solidify enough that bringing it to life requires a Team. Your Team comes together around a shared 'want' - 2 or 3 people who want what you want close enough to team-up as a Growness. Start your Growness. Give it a Name. Make a website for your Growness. Share the news with your Possibility Team, and everyone else too!

      After Cavitating 'Say What You Want' spaces once a day for 7 days, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.28 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #29 S.H.I.T. SAYS MEN RIGHTFULLY DOMINATE THE WORLD IN THEIR CAPITALIST PATRIARCHAL EMPIRE. UPDATED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS, NOW THAT MATRIARCHY AND PATRIARCHY HAVE RUN THEIR COURSE, A REGENERATIVE NONMATERIAL ECONOMY CULTURE IS NATURALLY EMERGING AROUND THE WORLD CALLED 'ARCHIARCHY'.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.29

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding Cultural Context and Responsibility while you study and do the Experiments together on the Set Context, What Now, Patriarchy, Hierarchy, and Psychopath websites.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"I used to think that the culture I was born and raised in was natural and right. Of course I am a woman and the men own me to do with as they please. I need the men's protection, and their money. Of course I am a man and the world is my playground. Someone else will clean up my messes. I am becoming a leader! I never asked if there were other ways of being. I never considered what 'Patriarchy' means."

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State which comes from realizing that I don't even know who I would be or how to behave if I am not like I am now. My mother and father behave like this. My teachers were like this. My boss and the leaders are all like this. Nobody actually cares about child sex trafficking, or the banks' dependence on heroin trade and war to make profits, or fossil fuels and water tables already being past peak, or that we have exceeded the limits of Capitalism, Patriachy, and the age of Empire, even while we witness Earth's ecosystems dying all around us, and us with them. Humans have overpopulated, but I want to live. Some people are refugees, but not me. Are we supposed to go back to being cavemen? I am afraid of going to the edges of modern culture. I will go crazy. I will fall off and die. Is there anything else?"

      Then write your concerns into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the validity of the awarenesses and questions challenging your current Thoughtware by doing the following Experiment. Sit in a circle Contexted in Torus Meeting Technology. A woman is the Spaceholder and she calls together a research Team named: 'HEY! LET'S WAKE UP'. Start with each person vulnerably speaking for 5 minutes about their own doubts and questions. Say something like, "I see Patriarchy using Hierarchical Power Structures that automatically advance Psychopaths to the top. It is a design error, promoted by the Psychopaths themselves, and it is annihilating life on Earth." The Spaceholder asks what people think and feel about what they see going on, and what they actually did about it today. This is not about having a Gameplan or coming up with 'solutions to the problems'. Instead, this is about getting unstuck, coming to life, stirring things up, and coming together. It is the coming together in a Radically Responsible and a creatively collaborative Context that is effective and revolutionary. Let yourself hear different people's unspoken wounds and fears, and also their theoretical action plans. Is a Bridgehouse possible for you? What about an Archiarchy Invention Center? Let it be a little crazy. Focus on connecting with more and more concerned human beings, people who see with energized awareness and are ready to step into action. Let more Love flow between you. Plan to stay connected with these people for a long time. Send them your Newsletter! Let yourself be extraordinarily well fed by this meeting.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, as you put your feet on the floor first thing each morning, make a conscious choice about where you are going to plant your feet that day. You have enough Distinctions to choose now. You can put your feet into Patriarchy to be a pawn in someone else's Gameworld desperately trying to make enough money to survive, or, you can walk your day in Archiarchy, inventing how it goes each moment, starting over without Assumptions or Conclusions, being a Radically Responsible Spaceholder for life, playing Full Out, Creatively Collaborating with Gaia. Ask your Team to help you organize and deliver a WorkTalk online or in person titled something like, 'DEEP QUESTIONS HAVE POWER'. Write people's questions on a flip-chart board to transform them from a mere idea into ink on paper in the physical world. Share the Possibility that who people are is the question they hold in the center of their Being. Their question becomes their Quest, a 'Quest-Ion', to inspire their days and nights with hope, because a person with hope knows what to do next. Record and post your WorkTalk.

      After posting the recording of your WorkTalk, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.29 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please enter the link to your WorkTalk video. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #30 S.H.I.T. SAYS ONLY CAPITALISTIC PATRIACHAL EMPIRE CAN CREATE A GROWING ECONOMY. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS BEING INSANE DOES NOT CHANGE THE LAWS OF PHYSICS. YOUR WASTES NEED TO NURTURE YOUR BABIES OR YOUR ECONOMY IS SUICIDAL.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.30

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding capitalist economics while you study and do the Experiments together on the Nonmaterial Value, Archan Economics, and Become Money websites.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"I used to think that we lived in an advanced civilization that made sense, that promoted freedom and democracy, that develops technological solutions, and that I could be proud of because it was noble."

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State because I see a new culture showing up through the cracks in Patriarchy. It is Archiarchy, the regenerative, adulthood-initiation-centered, nonmaterial-value, radical-responsibility culture rapidly emerging around the world now that Matriarchy and Patriarchy have run their course. I could not see this culture before, but now I notice it is not just hippies and Extinction Rebellion people. It is already more than 300 million Cultural Creatives around the world laying down tracks for a new future. I have been hiding out at Child-Level responsibility, thinking that if I outsource responsibility and make a 'profit' by 'externalizing costs', then third-world people can pay the price, or people in the future. I am getting a sense that my Gremlin is running my life and I am living in a sewer pit. Holy Shit!"

      Then write what you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by all standing in a circle in an empty room and having a Rage Club. One person is the Spaceholder and says something like,"I am researching the connection between the Capitalist Patriarchal Empire, Hierarchical Power Structures, Psychopaths, Global Warming, and extinction of species. I want to use my Anger and my Grief and my Fear as fuel to start over. I am escaping from Patriarchy. I have a part to play in building next culture, Archiarchy. But I am trapped. I need to start by shouting sounds and words. Will you Hold Space for me? Will someone write down in my Beep! Book what I say?" Yes! The Spaceholder goes first! Someone writes down all that they say while the others encourage the Spaceholder to step further and further out of the Patriarchy and into a new life for themselves. When the Spaceholder comes to a pause, they shout, "Who's next?" Then the next person feels and expresses the clarity of their Conscious Feelings while someone writes down what they say in their Beep! Book. Continue around the circle until everyone who wants to has gone wild in this safe Space. Then circle up the chairs and Beep! Books and share the Golden Treasures of new experiences and Distinctions you all gained in this Rage Club session. Whole new lives have started this way. What will happen to you? Consider training how to be a Rage Club Spaceholder yourself to help others flame on into a new life.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, spend no money. Figure out ways to eat, sleep, be alive and well without holding money at the forefront of your world. As an alternative activity, focus your energy on creating. Not creating things, but creating Spaces and experiences for yourself and others. Cavitate and share Spaces of Discovery, Adventure, Exploration, Invention, and Transformation. Reality has its own economics. By now, after 29 weeks of skill building, you source Thoughtware Upgrades that are more valuable than money can pay for. This is Archan Economics. There are already enough shoes in the world. There are already enough weapons in the world. Global fertility rates have dropped below replacement level in all 'developed' nations. People cry out for alternative ways of thinking, and you have them. Make and publish a Video or write an Article about whatever you create.

      After sharing the Video or Article about your experiments in Archan Economics, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.30 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please enter the link to your Video or Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #31 S.H.I.T. SAYS YOU ARE DEFINED AT BIRTH BY YOUR RACE, CLASS, AND CREED. UPDATED ARCHAN CULTURE SAYS YOU CAN RELOCATE YOUR POINT OF ORIGIN TO A NEW CONTEXT OF MUTUAL EMPOWERMENT, THAT NO ONE CAN TO IT FOR YOU, BUT NO ONE CAN STOP YOU FROM DOING IT.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.31

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding your identity and self-image while you study and do the Experiments together on the Shift Identity and Point Of Origin websites.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"I used to think that I am an individual person and that my decisions and actions originate from my own free will."

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State because I realize that the Point Of Origin of my Thoughtware determines how I interact with the Possibilities of life. I was born into the same Point Of Origin as my parents and culture, but now I have the option of relocating my Point Of Origin anywhere I want. Each Point Of Origin starts from a Context and provides a unique worldview and mindset. Yes, I have habits of perception. Yes, I believe in a specific set of solutions to life's challenges. But these are all variables that can re-start themselves from a new Point Of Origin, giving me whole new domains to create in and resources to work with."

      Then write what you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment together sitting in a circle. Pull our your Beep! Book and start a new page titled: 'ORIGINAL POINT OF ORIGIN'. Describe in writing the milieu you were given as a child, the sense, purpose, mood, unconscious intentions, rules, pressing needs, unnecessary sacrifices, superstitions, and secret dreams in the Context you placed your Point Of Origin into as a child.

      Write for 10 minutes without stopping.

      A few people read out loud what they wrote to note the similarities and differences experienced by each person. Just because you are a White Anglo Saxon Protestant does not mean your Point Of Origin is the same. Some of you are Princesses, while some of you are thieves, trolls, and con artists.

      Now, everyone stand up, spin around 360 degrees to get a little dizzy, then sit down with a new possibility, the possibility of writing out an entirely novel Point Of Origin. This is not your 'ideal' or 'the best' or 'Fantasy World' Point Of Origin. But it should be something wildly different and somehow more attractive to you than the Point Of Origin of your birth. Describe it in detail for 10 minutes without stopping.

      Some people read out loud what you wrote to share your sparkling insights and delightful revelations about what else is possible.

      To quote the fist Possibilitator: "Something completely different from this is possible right now." Shifting your Point Of Origin is one way to access the completely different. But to shift your Point Of Origin, you need radical Clarity about what you are pulling yourself out of, and what you are planting yourself in to.

      At this moment you are throwing worlds around. But in the next moment, if you want, you get to choose a new world!

      After you have cogitated over the wild ideas from others in your Possibility Team, and also remembered the life you hoped to be born into as a baby, and also remembering what you yourself just wrote out as a new possible life field... choose one.

      The point is, you don't get to choose 'All Of The Above' (unless you are Timothy Scott Bennett). You get to choose ONE.

      The other point is, if you can relocate your Point Of Origin once, you can relocate it again. Your choice of where to plant your Point Of Origin is not final. It is an iteration, a draft. If you don't like your new Context, you can pull up your roots and relocate whenever you want.

      Ready? Here we go!

      Follow the PROCEDURE given on the Point Of Origin website. This will take about 20 minutes if you all go at the same time. It will be loud.

      When you are done, rest. Gently explore your new territory together. Make no important decisions for the next 3 days.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, walk through the world as a Private Investigator searching for a Point Of Origin for Authentic Human Adulthood. Your life becomes a Meta Conversation, a convesation about the conversation, a life about life. No matter what other people think you are doing, what you are actually doing is hunting for the the next step on the Path of human Evolution. Write an Article about what you see is possible now, and how you are able to see this now. Read your Article at your Possibility Team.

      After publishing your Article, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.31 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please enter the link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #32 S.H.I.T. SAYS IF HAVE A UNIFORM, A BADGE, A DEGREE, A POSITION IN A HIERARCHY, OR A GUN, THEN YOU ARE AN AUTHORITY. UPDATED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS AUTHORITY IS A QUALITY OF THOROUGHLY BEING ONE'S BEING IN ACTION, A QUALITY WHICH GROWS THROUGH ADULTHOOD AND ARCHETYPAL INITIATORY PROCESSES.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.32

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding Authority while you study and do the Experiments together on the Authority and 8 Prisons websites.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"The Rule of Law of the modern capitalist patriarchal empire has no intention at all of ever arranging for anyone to have their own Authority.
