If people had their own Authority, who would join the army? Who would be the police, or the workers? God forbid that consumers would have the Authority to stop consuming!"

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State because I realize that if I were a bold person, and somehow spontaneously ignited enough Authority to live the Values that I value, and, if I Valued 'having personal Authority', rather than 'being seen and accepted as a normal member of society', I might actually unfold and activate my potentials. But, if my higher Value is to 'march lockstep' in the prevailing belief systems at work, religion, academia, government, etc., so I can be seen as a 'normal', 'acceptable', 'ordinary', or 'nice' person, then the chances of becoming my Bright Principles and Archetypal Lineage in action are about zero. Modern culture wants me stuck in my place at the bottom of the pyramid, where I pay to be born, pay to live, and pay to die. Until I go through Adulthood Initiations I am buried deep down in the 8 Prisons. I now decide to take my Authority back."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment in groups of 3 with your Beep! Book. Title a fresh page: 'HOW I GIVE MY AUTHORITY AWAY'. Look back over the days and nights of your life and write down each way you de-authorize and invalidate yourself, saying it out loud as you write it so others can write it down too. After 10 minutes, rearrange the chairs so the Possibilitator sits across from the Client, and the Coach sits at the side of the Possibilitator. The Possibilitator begins by reaching over to shake hands with the Client and asking, "What can I do for you?"

      The Client looks at their list and says, "I want to take my Authority back about _____. Will you help me?"

      The Possibilitator says, "Yes. Please make sure you are in First Position with your Center, Grounding Cord, and Bubble. At the count of 3, please tell me the color of your Grounding Cord. One. Two. Three."

      The Client answers.

      The Possibilitator continues, "Thank you. Please give your Beep! Book to the Coach so they can take notes. Now please close your eyes, take a deep breath, click your Clicker, and go back to the moment when you first gave this Authority away. Do not be surprised if it is in a Past Life. You will start to feel emotions. Please let the sounds out while you answer my questions. Is it day time, or night time? Are you inside, or outside? Is it a place you know, or a place you don't know? Are you alone, or with someone else? If you are with someone else, it is someone you know, or someone you don't know? Are you standing? Sitting? Or lying down? What is happening?"

      The Client feels emotions and reports what is happening.

      The Coach writes it down.

      The Possibilitator continues, "What happens next?"

      The Client feels more emotions and reports what happens next.

      The Coach writes it all down.

      At some point the Possibilitator senses they have arrived at the moment when the Client chooses to give their Authority away. The Possibilitator tries to get the exact words of that moment. They ask, "And in that moment, what did you decide?"

      The Client answers.

      The Possibilitator opens the field. "What else did you decide?"

      The Client answers.

      There may be 3 to 5 Old Decisions.

      The Possibilitator finally asks, "Are any of these Old Decisions still influencing your life today?"

      The Client usually says, "Yes! All of them!"

      The Possibilitator asks, "Would you like to make any New Decisions?"

      The Client usually says, "Yes!"

      The Possibilitator asks, "What would they be?"

      Formulating New Decisions is a bit mystical. The New Decision cannot simply be a logical contradiction of the Old Decisions. That does not work. The Possibilitator needs to Propose a Shift of Identity Decision to the Client which empowers them to start over as someone who already has that particular Authority back. For example, if the Old Decision was, "I will never take Authority to speak out my wild ideas again," the New Decision could be, "I am a Nonlinear Space Cavitator." Or, "I am a Thunderstorm of Wild Ideas." If the New Decision fits, you can watch the Client's 5 Bodies suddenly relax and reorder right before your eyes. They will feel incredible joy. It is wonderful.

      Then rotate roles until everyone has had a chance to take back a part of their Authority.

      NOTE: Each way that a person wrote that they give away their Authority is a Doorway for an Emotional Healing Process (EHP). They will not all be the same kind of process as above, but they will all be valuable stepping stones on the Client's Path.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, figure out what you would do with your Authority if you ever got it back. Then, from the place of already having your Authority back, write and publish an Article about what you are creating or uncreating with your Authority.

      After writing and publishing your Article, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.32 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please enter the link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #33 S.H.I.T. SAYS SUCCESS IS HAVING ENOUGH MONEY FOR VACATIONS AND COMFORTS TO STAY 'SAFE'. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS EACH MOMENT YOU ENGAGE A MATRIX-BUILDING PRACTICE YOU SUCCEED AT BRINGING YOUR BEING INTO MORE ALIVENESS, BECAUSE INITIATIONS CAUSE 'EVOLUTION BY REFLEX' AND EVOLUTION IS ECSTATIC.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.33

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding Adulthood and Initiations while you study the information given in the Initiations website, the recommended books, the articles, videos, and websites given. Also do the Experiments together on the Adulthood, and Path websites.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other, "Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) keeps me thinking and feeling as a child. I behave as an uninitiated adolescent even though I am older than 18 years of age."

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State because I realize that I am not Initiated. I don't even know what 'Authentic Adulthood Initiations' means. None of my friends or role models are Initiated. My parents were never initiated into the Adulthood Path. Am I prepared to be Initiated? How do I find Authentic Initiators? How do I explain to my friends that I want to get Initiated? Because I want to be Initiated."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment. In your Beep! Book, title a fresh page: 'MY NEXT INITIATIONS'. Then watch together the full 7-minute video below of available Archan Initiations. As the list slides by, grab out the names of Initiations that attract you for no Reason. Write them down in your Beep! Book. After the video, compare notes. What is next for people on your Team? Do several people want to do the same Initiations? Whip up a Gameplan to personally contact one of the Initiators. Call them up now, during your Possibility Team meeting. Tell them you want to depart from the Linear Life Plan and journey towards the Eye Of The Needle, one Initiation after the other. Ask them all your questions. Then ask them how much you would need to pay to have them come and deliver an Initiation at your next Possibility Team meeting. After an appointment is arranged, select an Initiation that interests several people. Open spaceport.mystrikingly.com, and choose a website that relates. Use your Possibility Team time to read and discuss the Context pages on that website, then actually do one of the Experiments together.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, make time each day to go to spaceport.mystrikingly.com and continue doing the Experiments that build out new territory at your Edge. Be sure to record the Matrix Code from each Experiment you complete!

      After having your meeting with the Initiator you contacted, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.33 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please name the Initiation you did with your guest Initiator at your Possibility Team. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #34 S.H.I.T. SAYS IF YOU DO NOT HAVE ENOUGH DRAMA IN YOUR LIFE, TURN ON THE NEWS TO SEE ALL THE BAD PEOPLE FROM WHOM THE GOVERNMENT KEEPS YOU SAFE. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS LOW DRAMA IS ANY ACTION DESIGNED TO AVOID RESPONSIBILITY. THERE IS NO ENEMY. WE ARE ALL SACRIFICED TO EVOLUTION. CONFLICT IS A DOORWAY TO HIGH DRAMA.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.34

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding Drama while you study and do the Experiments together on the 2 Dramas, Low Drama, High Drama, and Map Of Possibility websites.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"I am so addicted to Low Drama! If there is no problem to solve, who am I? If there is no Victim to Rescue, what shoud I do with my life? My friends have Low Drama. My family has Low Drama. There is Low Drama at work, Low Drama in the government. And if I ever run out of Low Drama in my own life, all I need to do is turn on the TV and I can get into the Low Drama of other people's lives."

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State because I realize that I don't even know what High Drama is! I never heard of it! Yet when I hear that 'High Drama' is possible, something in me that has been long asleep suddenly comes to life. Yes! This is what I am here for! I have been waiting around, surviving, wasting my precious time, but what I really want is to contribute a positive difference in the world, to be in a culture of Creative Collaboration that helps each other liberate Human Potentials and serves something greater than my scared little 'ego'."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment in groups of 3, sitting in chairs. The Possibilitator sits facing the Client, and the Coach sits to the side of the Possibilitator. At first, the Client does everything they can to be a Victim in a Low Drama, trying to force the Possibilitator into being a Rescuer or a Persecutor. The Possibilitator's job is to stay Present with the Client, and yet stay Unhookable. When the Coach notices even the slightest sign of being tempted to enter Low Drama in the Possibilitator, they say, "Beep! You shook your head and are starting to argue. You are Hooked! Come back to Center. Start Over. Shift! Go!" Continue for 10 minutes. Then pause and shift the Purpose. The Client sources High Drama, and the Possibilitator shifts from trying to avoid the Low Drama of the Client, to trying to Creatively Collaborate with the High Drama of the Client.

      What? The Client does not know how to create High Drama? The Emotions that come up here could easily be the Doorway for an important Emotional Healing Process. (EHP). Either do the EHP now, or make sure they write the emotions and the triggering idea down at the back of their Beep! Book for doing as the next available opportunity.

      After the High Drama Practice round, rotate roles and start again, until everyone has had the chance to Practice avoiding Low Drama and collaborating in High Drama.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, hold a Gap of Space between you and the energetics of other people's interactions to detect what they are creating with each other, Low Drama or High Drama. Make Sherlock Holmes notes in your Beep! Book as you research the most powerful ways people co-create Low Drama, and the blocks they have against co-creating High Drama. Write and publish an Article titled something like: 'Where Did The High Drama Go?'. Read it at your next Possibility Team.

      After publishing your Article, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.34 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please give the link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #35 S.H.I.T. SAYS, "IF I WIN AND YOU LOSE, THEN IT WAS A FAIR COMPETITION. HA! HA! BETTER LUCK NEXT TIME." UPDATED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS THERE ARE 3 GAMES:

      1. 'I WIN-YOU LOSE' COMPETITIONS (WHICH ARE GREMLIN GAMES)

      2. 'WIN-WIN' GAMES, WHICH OFTEN DEGRADES INTO 'LOSE-LOSE' THROUGH COMPROMISE, OR "IT'S OKAY WITH ME IF YOU WIN, AS LONG AS I WIN JUST A LITTLE BIT MORE..." WHICH IS 'I WIN-YOU LOSE' (AGAIN A GREMLIN GAME)

      3. 'WINNING HAPPENING' WHERE THERE IS NO 'I' AND NO 'YOU' BECAUSE 'WINNING HAPPENING' IS A BRIGHT PRINCIPLE.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.35

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding different kinds of human interactions while you study and do the Experiments together on the 3 Games website.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"I thought competition was good. I thought Darwin's laws about 'the survival of the fittest' create the best outcomes for everyone. I thought competition leads to efficient innovation."

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State because I never understood how damaging a 'scarcity' conversation is for the wellbeing of human societies and the ecosystems of planet Earth. I don't know how to feel good when someone else wins. Clearly different Values are involved. Why should I feel glad because you feel glad? Perhaps my own Purpose is Unconscious. Perhaps I am serving Shadow Principles or Hidden Purposes. It is difficult for me to believe that love is not scarce, or that I do not have to battle against others for the best things in life. I wonder if I might be more deeply contaminated with Patriarchal Thoughtware than I ever thought possible. What is the Bright Principle of Winning Happening? What is Status?"

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment together sitting in groups of 3. The Possibilitator sits across from the Client, and the Coach sits next to the Possibilitator. The Coach reaches into their pocket or purse and pulls out a coin. Decide which side of the coin is 'heads' and which side is 'tails'. Then the Coach flips it into the air and shouts out, "Possibilitator!" or, "Client!" to decide who makes the call.

      Whoever the Coach calls out must now call out, "Heads!" or "Tails!" guessing which side of the coin faces upwards in the Coach's hand when she catches it.

      The Coach then opens her hand and all look at the coin to see who is the 'Winner' and who is the 'Loser'.

      Then the Coach looks at the 'Loser' and asks, "How does it feel to be the Loser?"

      The 'Loser' answers in detail what they think and what they feel as the 'Loser'.

      Then the Coach asks, "But, are you a Loser?"

      The 'Loser' answers however their Box would have them answer.

      Then the Coach looks at the 'Winner' and asks, "How does it feel to be the Winner?"

      The 'Winner' answers in detail what they think and what they feel as the 'Winner'.

      Then the Coach asks, "But are you a Winner?"

      The 'Winner' answers however their Box would have them answer.

      Then the Coach asks both, "And how do you feel about each other?"

      Both say what they think and what they feel about the other.

      Then the Coach flips the coin into the air again, and calls out either, "Possibilitator!" or, "Client!"

      Whoever the Coach named guesses which side of the coin will face up this time.

      The Coach then opens her hand and all look at the coin to see who is the 'Winner' and who is the 'Loser' this time.

      The Coach asks the 'Loser', "How does it feel to be the Loser?"

      The 'Loser' answers in detail what they think and what they feel as the 'Loser'.

      Then the Coach asks, "But, are you a Loser?"

      The 'Loser' answers however their Box would have them answer.

      Then the Coach asks the 'Winner', "How does it feel to be the Winner?"

      The 'Winner' answers in detail what they think and what they feel as the 'Winner'.

      Then the Coach asks, "But are you a Winner?"

      The 'Winner' answers however their Box would have them answer.

      Then the Coach asks both, "And how do you feel about each other?"

      Both say what they think and what they feel about the other.

      The Coach says, "This time, the results could have been the same Winner and Loser as last time, or a different Winner and Loser as last time. What Stories did you make up about yourself if you were the 'Loser' twice? If you were the 'Winner' twice?"

      "What Stories did you make up about who the Coach called to make the guess?"

      "What Stories did you make up if you were once a 'Loser' and once a 'Winner'?"

      "Have you ever thought up these Stories about yourself before in your life?"

      "Talk about it."

      Then rotate around to sit in the next chair and start over.

      After everyone has had a chance to play in all 3 roles of the Win-Lose Coin Toss Game, look at the liftings.mystrikingly.com website. There you will see a photo of a woman in a red shirt being given a 'Lifting' by other women.

      Give the Spaceholder of the Possibility Team an 8 minute lifting. Their eyes are closed. No music. No talking. No rocking.

      Giving a lifting is a Winning Happening game because the entire village is called in to celebrate the emergence and healing of one of the Villagers. Everyone gets to contribute to the well being of the Village. By celebrating the celebration, everyone gets fed.

      PART 4: For the next 2 days, note how many subtle, quick, Win-Lose games you play in. Do you get a seat on the bus or must you stand? Did the boss praise you or someone else? Did you stand in the fastest line at the grocery store, or did someone else? Did you get to choose which film you watch or someone else? Did you massage them or did they massage you? On and on. What sort of Story do you make up each time you play in a Win-Lose game if you win? Or if you lose?

      After the next 2 days, try to lose in the Win-Lose games. Lose on purpose. How does it feel to be a Winner Maker? You just discovered how to be a Winner by losing! Suddenly you are playing a game that other people do not even know you are playing! You just invented a Meta World for yourelf to occupy and explore. How big can you make your Meta World? Who else can you invite to play in your Meta World? (Watch THIS FILM...)

      Then after the next 2 days, figure out ways to make Win-Lose games into Winning Happening, and intervene by making Proposals for Winning Happening games. For example, make up a new Purpose. Change the Story of the game. Change one Rule.

      For example, think of Soccer. Soccer, as originally formulated, is a Win-Lose game. But it doesn't have to be! Change one rule, such as: Whenever someone makes a goal, that person switches to the other Team. Suddenly you have a Winning Happening game!

      Think of Racket Ball, another Win-Lose game. Make the Rule that between each hit the player must change racket hands, flip the racket in the air 360 degrees, and spin full circle around before hitting the ball again. Count how many times you and your partner can keep the ball going before someone crashes.

      Write and publish an Article titled something like: 'Creating A Winning Happening Meta World'. Invent Winning Happening games to create more time, space, love, appreciation, novelty, inspiration, power, skill, space, distinctions, etc.

      After publishing your Article, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.35 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, list the link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #36 S.H.I.T. SAYS YOU HAVE A BRAIN. YOUR BRAIN LEARNS EVERYTHING IT NEEDS IN SCHOOL. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS EACH PERSON HAS 4 BRAINS (GREEN, RED, BLUE, AND YELLOW) AND ONE BRAIN IS DOMINANT. IN ANY TEAM OR GAMEWORLD YOU NEED THE VIEWPOINT, ENERGY, AND INTELLIGENCES OF ALL 4 BRAINS.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.36

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding different kinds of human awareness and capability while you study and do the Experiments together on the 4 Brains website.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"There are always people in every group I am in that I don't understand and can't cooperate with, including in my own family. It drives me crazy! I never knew there could be a reason for my frustrations, and ways to interact more productively."

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State because I feel sad about how much Potential and Creative Collaboration I have trampled upon or wasted, simply because I never knew each person had 4 Brains, with one of the Brains being dominant.

      1. The Reptile Brain / Green Brain (brain stem - medulla) was first to evolve. It is the 'fight or flight' 'trust or not trust' center, located at the base of the brain where the brain connects to the spinal cord. Green Brainers are most interested in the past, in connection, community, looking at family photos, reminiscing, hanging out, finding out how you are doing, and feeling loved before doing anything productive. Typical emotion is sadness.
      2. The Mammalian Brain / Red Brain (cerebellum) emerged next, located above the Reptile Brain as the 'me, me, me!' present-time, action-oriented brain, let's-get-a-move-on dancing Brain. Red Brainers want to shoot first and aim later. They bounce around, bored, trying to go fast and always be first. Typical emotion is anger.
      3. The Thinking Brain / Blue Brain (cerebral cortex) emerged most recently. Blue Brainers orient towards the future and logic. They want to discuss concepts, understand, make precise plans and clear decisions, and think it all through first. They want to know, and to know how before starting anything. Typical emotion is fear.
      4. The Cosmic Brain / Yellow Brain (hypothalamus) is located down deep in the center of the brain as the timeless, big picture, overview brain. From the Yellow Brain's perspective, things happen in their own time. A Yellow Brainer want peace and love, harmony, and if they are not attacked or ridiculed, they can make immense comprehensive logic leaps into whole new systems. They have amazing access to nonlinear possibility. Typical emotion is joy.

      Every Team needs all 4 Brains present to function intelligently. Every village needs a balance of all 4 Brain resources."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment together sitting in a big circle. After fully studying the Brain Types Chart and watching the short Communicating Between The 4 Brains video together, the Spaceholder asks for a volunteer to go first. Then work together as a Research Team to figure out which of that person's 4 Brains is the most dominant, and the decending order of their other 3 Brains. Then propose a few exercises and Experiments to them which they could use to enhance their 4 Brain awareness regarding both themselves and others. Make sure they understand and write down what you propose for future reference.

      After determining the relative influence of the 4 Brains for each person in your Possibility Team, shift into groups of 3 where the Possibilitator sits facing the Client, and the Coach sits to the side of the Possibilitator. In this Experiment, the Possibilitator practices communicating with the Client, who role plays a person with a dominant Brain Type that is the weakest of the Possibilitator's own 4 Brains. Both the Client and the Coach give the Possibilitator real-time Go! Feedback! Shift! Go! Feedback and Coaching. Practice for 13 minutes and then change roles, until everyone has had a chance to Practice.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, start with 2 days of changing your Brain dominance around. If you are Red Brain dominant, then Interact with everyone as if you are Blue Brain dominant for these 2 days. Use the attitudes, priorities, and language of the Blue Brain. Write down other people's reactions to your changed behavior, and record their questions in your Beep! Book - both from friends and strangers.

      If someone asks you what you are doing, don't lie. Simply say something like, "I am doing Thoughtware Upgrade Experiment #36 and trying out the 4 different Brain Types. It is amazingly Fun to explore things I never thought could be explored before."

      Then, for the next 2 days, switch to one of the other Brain types, for example Green or Yellow.

      Then, for the next 2 days, switch to the third of the 3 Brain Types that is not your dominant Brain Type.

      Then for the last of the 7 days, interact with people giving them the information and interaction experience that you have all 4 Brain Types equally balanced. For example, give them 4 answers to each of their questions, and do it in a way that does not make them suspicious that you are just trying to be weird. The Purpose is to expand your capacity to reach into and make use of the treasures of all 4 Brain Types.

      Write an Article about your week-long Experiment to share the gold you discovered, including stories about surprising Brain Type moments.

      After writing your Article, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.36 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, enter the link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #37 S.H.I.T. SAYS LIFE IS LIFE. SOME MAKE IT. SOME DON'T. BAD PEOPLE GO TO PRISON. GOOD PEOPLE BECOME PRESIDENT. UPDATED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS THAT ON THE AUTHENTIC ADULTHOOD PATH EACH PERSON STARTS TRAPPED IN 8 PRISONS: 1. MOTHER'S BELLY. 2. FATHER'S CONTROL. 3. PARENT'S HOUSEHOLD CULTURE. 4. SCHOOL SYSTEM. 5. BIRTH CULTURE BELIEFS. 6. BIRTH RELIGION BELIEFS. 7. PATRIARCHY. 8. LINEAR LIFE PLAN. INITIATIONS GET YOU OUT.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.37

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding freedom while you study and do the Experiments together on the 8 Prisons website.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"There is so much ridiculous talk of 'human rights' or 'living in a free country' while everyone I meet or see on TV is secretly in so much pain about themselves or their life."

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State because there is a map describing an escape route from 8 nested levels of psycho-emotional Thoughtware prisons. I feel so angry and sad about being so pointlessly trapped for so long in such flimsy fetters. I also feel so scared about trying to escape. What if I fail and can't make it out? What if I am caught trying to escape? What if I succeed? What is out there beyond the 8 Prisons? Does anyone ever make it? If so, where are all the people outside of the systems of control? What are they doing? How do they live? How would I live?"

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment together sitting in a big circle. The Spaceholder asks for a volunteer. Then everyone helps that person research their Escape Plan. What evidence shows they have escaped from which of the 8 Prisons, and what evidence reveals they are still trapped and where.

      After everyone has their 8 Prisons Map, see what comes up for people. Ask the question of each other, "So, what is next for you? What do you want to do about it?" Feelings and Emotions may arise for people. If needed, use the rest of your time at the Possibility Team either doing - or arranging to do - Emotional Healing Processes (EHP) or the related Authentic Adulthood Initiatory Processes, perhaps even calling in an Initiator and doing Initiations as a Team.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, walk through your life detecting how the surrounding culture you live in supports its citizens staying in the 8 Prisons. Specifically how do the businesses, transportation options, city infrastructure design, lifestyles, marketing billboards, sporting events, music, news and beauty magazines, etc. cater to the prisoners? How do they lull the prisoners to sleep about their imprisoned condition? How do they provide the prisoners with distracting obsessions, or drugs to subdue their desires for liberation? What neurotic manifestations mirror how a lion in a zoo paces back and forth inside their cage? Visit a modern art museum and view what is displayed there from the perspective that it is 'prison art'. Watch how the people in your town interact with each other during their daily routines inside their prisons. What social protocols do they use to avoid recognizing their imprisoned condition? Make notes, and then use your notes to write and publish a short story about a person - who is actually you - discovering the limitations of their imprisonment, and finding ways to accomplish an escape. Be sure to include how they make use of their new-found freedoms of movement. Read your story at your next Possibility Team.

      After writing publishing your short story, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.37 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please give the link to you short story. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #38 S.H.I.T. SAYS IF YOU CAN GET AWAY WITH STEALING, LYING, PILLAGING, AND RAPING THEN YOU CAN CLIMB THE HIERARCHY AND BE SUCCESSFUL. UPDATED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS IF YOU DO NOT SEE YOUR GREMLIN SITTING NEXT TO YOU ON A SHORT LEASH, HE IS HOLDING THE STEERING-WHEEL OF YOUR LIFE. THEN YOU LIVE SERVING SHADOW PRINCIPLES. AUTHENTIC ADULTHOOD INITIATIONS INCLUDE GREMLIN TRANSFORMATION.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.38

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding your Gremlin while you study and do the Experiments together on the Gremlin website.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"Human beings have made the world into a horrible mess, even though everyone I know wants a bright future for their children. No one wants to exterminate plants or animals. No one wants to fill rivers with plastic or make oceans full of dead zones. Yet every time I turn on the TV or go to the movies there are people killing each other. What is really going on?"

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State because I can see the Gremlin in my mother and father. I can see the Gremlin in my brothers and sisters, my neighbors, my relatives, fellow drivers on the road. I can see the lying, abusive, selfish, power-hungry Gremlins in politicians, in priests, in corporate directors and bankers. It is not a military/medical industrial complex. It is a Gremlin industrial complex. Those who have achieved positions of power in the hierarchy have succeeded because they are Gremlins. If everywhere I look I see Gremlins... then I must have a Gremlin too... and this scares me. If I do not manipulate, threaten, deceive or hide from the people around me, how can I survive?"

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment together sitting in a big circle. The Spaceholder asks if there are any questions or comments about Gremlin. The Spaceholder is not supposed to know the answers, or even to find the answers. This is a Research Space. Ask, "What does anyone here already know about Gremlin? Are any of you participating in the Gremlin Transformation work? What can you tell us? What have you found? Where are you on your Path of putting your Gremlin on a leash at your side, learning your Gremlin's name, and listing your Gremlin's favorite foods?"

      This is such a humbling and eye-opening conversation to have with your friends. Think about why. What other group are you in that distinguishes 'Gremlin' in their Rules Of Engagement? What other group asks you to keep your Gremlin consciously at your side on a short leash, so it is not making stupid hurtful comments and jokes, so it is not restricting your life to merely survival intimacies? What other group invites you to consciously call upon your Gremlin to serve as an unlimited resource of Nonlinear Possibility? Or to empower you to Practice and Experiment beyond your Box's familiar comfort zone so you can of Build Matrix for your Healing and Evolution?

      What are you going to do now?

      Ask people to come up with examples of Gremlin helping your Possibility Team accomplish its exploratory adventures. Also ask people to give examples of Gremlin undermining vulnerability or destroying extraordinary Spaces.

      Gremlin is not bad, and not wrong, and not stupid. Your Gremlin has helped to save your life on multiple occassions, perhaps ongoingly. Gremlin defends your Box so you can Survive. But now your steps beyond Survival and into Adulthood Living are obstructed by a Gremlin who is feeling afraid that you cannot take care of yourself unless he or she is in charge of your life. Is it time for you to Grow Up? Use this Possibility Team Space to put the Poop On The Table. Take a look at what is really going on.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, keep the Gremlin distinctions in mind. Observe yourself to find your Gremlin's tone of voice, strategies for 'success', attitudes and 'tricks of the trade'. Keep your Beep! Book handy and capture details for a list titled, 'MY GREMLIN'S FOODS'. Try to find at least 50 ways your Gremlin gets attention and energy to feed itself. It may not be a pretty sight, but it could be one of the most useful investigations you ever do for yourself. Gremlin 'eats' nasty interactions, side comments, insults, causing a ruckus, disturbing the peace, setting traps for other people to fall into, breaking the law, breaking the social rules, being superior, being arrogantly inferior, being right, making other people wrong, complaining, blaming, finding fault in others, breaking agreements, being 3 minutes late, cutting people off in traffic or conversations, hating others, hating yourself, beating yourself up in the Swamp, pressuring yourself to keep a Fantasy World alive for as long as you can, collapsing (again...) so others are betrayed, alcohol, smoking (anything...), stealing (anything... time, attention, money, space, other people's stuff...), eating sexual energy, invading intimate spaces, being better, being a problem, interrupting... you get the idea. What are your Gremlin's 50 favorite foods. If you do not write them down on your list then you do not get to make a choice about whether you eat them or not. Your Gremlin chooses... Publish 'My Gremlin's 50 Favorite Foods' as an Article.

      After publishing your Article, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.38 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please give the link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #39 S.H.I.T. SAYS YOU ARE YOU, IGNORING THAT 3 PERSONALITIES CAN SHOW UP IN THE COURSE OF SPEAKING ONE SENTENCE. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS THAT IN ADDITION TO HAVING MANY PARTS - EACH WITH THEIR OWN OPINION AND NEEDS, AND IN ADDITION TO HAVING PAST LIFE VOWS TO FULFILL, EACH PERSON ALSO HAS PARENT, CHILD, GREMLIN, AND DEMON EGOSTATES THAT CAN CONTAMINATE THE ADULT EGOSTATE, BLOCKING YOUR WAY TO THE ARCHETYPAL EGOSTATE.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.39

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding your Egostates while you study and do the Experiments together on the Egostate website.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"Sometimes I get so triggered! I try to be Adult, but what comes out is childish behavior, like a tantrum. I feel so abandonned and afraid. Or I criticize and judge other people, ordering them around, telling them what to do. Sometime I try to take Adult responsibility, but I hate it. I absolutely refuse. "

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State because nobody ever told me about Egostates. Even if I understand that there are identities I shift into, I never realized that I may have contaminated my Adult Egostate with one or more of the other Egostates (Parent Egostate, Child Egostate, Gremlin Egostate, Demon Egostate) as a Survival Strategy to protect myself. I also did not see that what once protected me has now become my prison! I never heard of anyone Decontaminating their Adult Egostate before. And I also never knew that the Adult Egostate is the gateway to the Archetypal Egostate. What the is the Archetypal Egostate, or the Archetypal Domains?"

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment together sitting in a big circle. The Spaceholder asks if there are any questions or comments about Egostates. The Spaceholder is not supposed to know the answers, or even to find the answers. This is Research Space. Ask,"What does anyone here already know about Egostates? Are any of you participating in the Egostate Decontamination work? What can you tell us? What have you found? Where are you on your Path of Decontaminating your Adult Egostate?"

      The Spaceholder asks for a volunteer. Then everyone helps that person research their Adult Egostate Contaminations, e.g. you are contaminated by which Egostate? And contaminated to what percentage?

      For example, one person may stay silently invisible, but if pressed will react by going into overwhelm and whining. This would be Child Egostate Contamination, perhaps 60%. They might also criticize and judge anyone they imagine to be an Authority Figure, trying to correct them to a known set of rules or behaviors. This could be Parent Egostate Contamination, perhaps 30%, for a total of 90% Contamination of their Adult Egostate.

      Another person might joke around and make 'funny' insults as their standard approach to intimacy, then if they are threatened or attacked, they immediately attack back with betrayal, resentment, and vengeful depression. This could be a Gremlin Contamination of their Adult Egostate, perhaps 80%.

      Be clear and specific with each person, giving them evidence and examples along the way. Make sure they write down your Team's assessment in their Beep! Book. If they do not write it down, immediately go to the next person.

      After everyone has their Contamination Assessment from the Team, Notice what comes up for people. Ask the question of each other, "So, what is next for you? What do you want to do about this?" Feelings and Emotions may arise for people. If needed, use the rest of your time at the Possibility Team meeting doing - or arranging to do - Emotional Healing Processes (EHP) or Decontamination related Authentic Adulthood Initiatory Processes, perhaps even calling in an Initiator and doing Initiations as a Team.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, keep the Egostate distinctions in mind. Observe what you actually create with people, and what feedback you receive each time you try to be an Adult. What are you first and second strategies when you are under stress? (Channel 'A' and Channel 'B' of your Box). For example, Channel A might be to shout with anger. Channel B might be to sob in tears. Keep your Beep! Book handy and capture details for a list titled, 'MY EGOSTATE CONTAMINATIONS'. Try to find at least 50 ways your Adult Egostate behaves in ways that are Contaminated by the other Egostates. It may not be a pretty sight, but it could be one of the most useful investigations you ever do for yourself. Compile your list into an Article. Publish the Article.

      After making your Egostate Contaminations list and publishing your Article, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.39 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please give the link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #40 S.H.I.T. SAYS, "MMMMMMMM! SEXUAL ENERGY EXCHANGE! THIS IS THE COIN OF THE REALM IN BUSINESS AND POLITICS. HOW MUCH CAN I GET?" UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS UNCONSCIOUS SEXUAL ENERGY EXCHANGE IS AN ORDINARY SURVIVAL STRATEGY. IF YOU ARE DOING SURVIVAL, THEN YOU ARE NOT BEING YOURSELF, SO YOU ARE NOT LIVING AND NOT RELATING.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.40

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding the White Widow Survival Strategy while you study and do the Experiments together on the Survival Strategy, White Widow, and Sexual Abuse websites.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other, "I feel scared about this Thoughtware Upgrade because everyone I see is involved in doing - or pretending they are not doing - White Widow, Grey Widow, or Black Widow sexual energy exchanges at every level of society. But no one is admitting it or talking about it."

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State because I see how much Sexual Abuse there is, and how much Sexual Engery Exchange is going on. One part of me is screaming, 'This is bad and wrong! It has to stop!' Another part of me is screaming, 'This is the best thing in my life and I won't let you take it away from me!' Neither approach is true. What is true, is that if your sexuality (or lack of it) is applied as a Survival Strategy (in response to being Sexually Abused), then you are blocked from being authentically intimate in 5 Bodies. Coming back to life starts with becoming aware of your White Widow moves so you can regain the choice of enacting those moves or not."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment together sitting in a big circle. The Spaceholder asks if there are any questions or comments about 'White Widow'. The Spaceholder is not supposed to know the answers, or even to find the answers. This is Research Space. Ask,"What does anyone here already know about White Widow? Are any of you doing White Widow rehabilitation work? What can you tell us? What have you found? Where are you on your Path of Rehabilitating the White Widow in you?"

      Then the Spacholder asks everyone to slowly stand up, move all the chairs over to the side of the room, then line up across the room, with the strongest and most potent White Widow at the head of the line, and the weakest and least potent white Widow at the other end of the line. Notice that the White Widow Survival Strategy is used by both Women and Men.

      Then the Spaceholder asks each person to reveal which sensing criteria they used to detect the White Widow ratings. Invite people to form up into White Widow Healing 3 Cells if they want to take this further, and have their first 3 Cell meeting right now. Invite them to be Radically Honest with each other, taking the conversation as deep as it can go in this ultra safe Space. Feelings and Emotions may arise. Use the rest of the Meeting to do - or arrange to do - Emotional Healing Processes (EHP).

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, keep the White Widow distinctions sharply in mind. For the first 3 days, put your Attention on other people around you. Scan for how, when, and why they do their White Widow energy exchanges. How well does it work for them? What do they get? What do they miss out on?

      For the next 4 days, expand your your Noticing to Self Observation adout Sexual Energey Exchange. How and when and why are you being a White Widow with others? How and when and why are others trying to be White Widows with you? Make many notes. Use your notes to write and publish a short story titled something like, 'I Used To Know A White Widow,' about the discovery and transformation of the White Widow Survival Strategy.

      After publishing your short story, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.40 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please enter the link to your short story. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #41 S.H.I.T. SAYS IF YOU ARE SICK, YOU GO TO THE DOCTOR. HE GIVES YOU SOME PILLS AND YOU GO BACK TO BEING YOUR OLD SELF AGAIN. THIS IS '2 PHASE HEALING'. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE APPLIES '3 PHASE HEALING'. YOUR CURRENT STATE IS PHASE 1. WHEN YOU ENTER A LIQUID STATE IN ANY OF YOUR 5 BODIES, THIS IS PHASE 2. PHASE 3 IS THE OTHER SIDE OF THE EVOLUTIONARY LIQUID STATE WHERE YOU MORPH INTO A NEW SHAPE AND A NEW RELATIONSHIP WITH THE UNIVERSE.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.41

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding your Healing while you study and do the Experiments together on the 3 Phase Healing and Self Surgery websites.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"When I depend on a medical doctor to keep me healthy, he makes money from me being sick. Why would he want me to get better? I seem to oscillate back and forth between a temporary state and then various kinds of illness. The doctors cures don't actually change anything in me."

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State because Transformational Healing was not part of my college education. By using 3 Phase Healing rather than 2 Phase healing, illnesses or accidents become part of my evolutionary Path. I can use an illness as a Doorway to becoming someone new who leaves the illness behind. So many illnesses arise from ancient unexpressed emotional knots tied up in various parts of my 5 Bodies. Both Feelings Practitioners and Possibility Coaches offer a full menu of 3 Phase Healing Processes. Plus it is possible to create an Archiarchy Artabana Health and Well Being Cooperative."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment together sitting in a big circle. Have an Archiarchy Artabana Meeting. The objective is to hold a Radical Reality space in which each person one-at-a-time gets real about their health issues, where they come from, how it is going, and collecting ideas and support from all the others about that issue using deep wisdom combined with personal experience. Bring each other along the 3 Phase Healing path as best you can, for example getting in Teams of 3 and removing Energetic Blocks, or by Completing Incomplete Emotions standing in pairs, or by helping each other in Teams of 3 to discover your Hidden Competing Commitments. Make sure you have tissues, buckets, and hand towels so participants can express their feelings as they report. You are one Winning Happening Team. Perhaps you never had so many people around you all helping you to be healthy, happy, and free.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, equate your Liquid States - even the tiniest Liquid States that vanish in a minute or two, like discovering that the Post Office is closed, or, the restaurant is out of the salad you ordered - as Phase 2 of a 5 Body 3 Phase Healing Process. List each Liquid State in your Beep! Book along with the transformation of which it is part. Celebrate your Liquid States because it puts your life in flux so that things can keep evolving. Practice admitting and augmenting your evolutionary changes. Keep taking on new Practices and telling others the new skills and awarenesses you are Practicing. View yourself as an evolutionary protoplasm inside of your 5 Bodies. Keep being surprised and in Awe about how much can evolve and appear.

      After the 7 days of exploring your 3 Phase Healing Experiences, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.41 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please describe one of your surprising Liquid States. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #42 S.H.I.T. SAYS YOU ARE ON THE LINEAR LIFE PLAN: GET BORN, GO TO SCHOOL, GET A JOB, GET MARRIED, BUY A HOUSE, START YOUR OWN BUSINESS, WRITE YOUR BOOK, RETIRE, GO TO AN OLD PEOPLE'S HOME, DIE. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS THERE IS AN ARCHETYPAL PATH FOR THE EVOLUTION OF CONSCIOUSNESS THAT STARTS BY ESCAPING FROM THE DISTRACTIONS OF MODERN CULTURE. THE CHALLENGE IS THAT YOU CANNOT ENTER ADULTHOOD WITH BAGGAGE FROM ADOLESCENCE. IT MAKES YOU TOO BIG TO GO THROUGH THE EYE OF THE NEEDLE.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.42

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding life as a human being by studying and doing the Experiments together on the Linear Life Plan and Eye Of The Needle websites.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"Nobody ever told me about the Linear Life Plan. Sure, we made jokes about it, but nobody said anything about a 'Nonlinear Life Plan' to me. Who is doing this? How does a Nonlinear Life Plan go? Is it really posslble?"

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State because I never knew that leaving childhood and adolescence to begin Adulthood costs everything that does not 'fit through the eye of a needle'. What does it meant that 'I will fail to go through a Doorway unless I am at the Doorway'? How can I get properly prepared? I look around at modern life and it seems to take up all of people's time and energy. How can I conserve enough energy and Attention to make efforts to grow up? What Baggage am I carrying? What vampires am I feeding in my daily life? I want to (do not want to) learn about all this! They say that trying to sneak into Adulthood without paying full price is circular-logic, a Gremlin strategy that brings me back to the start of adolescence."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment together sitting in groups of 4 in chairs, where 3 Possibilitators face the Chosen One. Chosen One gives their Beep! Book to one of the Possibilitators who starts a new page with the title: BAGGAGE, VAMPIRES, AND PREPARATIONS. The Chosen One's Job is for 5 minutes to announce the Baggage they carry, the Vampires they feed (such as a lawn, a swimming pool, a boat, a second home (especially if rented out through AirBnB), a corporate job, sending their kids to school, Credit Card debts, loans, being a member of a church, etc., and the Preparations they would need to do to fit through the Eye of the Needle. During those 5 minutes, and then for the next 5 minutes, the Possibilitator Team asks the Chosen One questions for further details, while at the same time pointing out and writing down additional Baggage, Vampires, and Preparations in the Chosen One's Beep! Book, especially about where they are in the concept world of a 'Linear Life Plan' (e.g. trying to get married, saving money to start their own business, already retired and waiting for the old people's home... etc.).

      Then shift into groups of 3 and form 'Linear Life Plan Life Raft' 3Cells to support each other to create a Gameplan to help each other out of the traps.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, consider yourself on retreat from the Linear Life Plan. Whether you keep 'going to work' or not is up to you. The invitation here is to as often as possible, step outside of the Linear Life Plan and see who you are there. Do you sit at the seashore? Do you go square dancing every evening? Do you write poetry, practice the Sitar, tend your vegetable garden? Who are you when you are not subsumed by the Linear Life Plan, or not trying to sedate your pain about giving your life to the Linear Life Plan with loud music, alcahol, fast driving, drugs, smoking, buying stuff you don't need, gossiping, gambling, porn, sweets, being manic, being depressed, etc.? How do you truly feel about the Baggage you carry? What is its Purpose? Who are you carrying it for? Could there be anything of interest for you on the other side of the Eye of the Needle? Make notes and write a personal exploratory Article about life outside the 'rat race'.

      After publishing your Article, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.42 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please give the link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #43 S.H.I.T SAYS YOU CAN USE MARKETING TRICKS TO BECOME AN INSTAGRAM DIVA SO THAT EVEN IF YOU ARE NOT SUCCESSFUL IN MODERN CULTURE YOU CAN STILL BE 'SUCCESSFUL' IN THE NEW AGE SCENE. UPDATED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS BEWARE THE HANDSOME HOLY TRIBAL MAN, THE 'GEORGEOUS TANTRIC SHAKTI GODDESS'. THE SHOW YOU PUT ON IS SIMPLY ANOTHER SURVIVAL STRATEGY, ANOTHER INAUTHENTIC DEAD-END TRAP ALONG THE PATH.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.43

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding life outside the mainstream by studying and doing the Experiments together on the Handsome Holy Tribal Man and Path websites.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"Nobody ever told me about the 'Path', or about trying to feel safe by joining others to follow a Georgeous Tantric Shakti Goddess / Handsome Holy Tribal Man. I thought these people are my 'Village'. I thought I was making a difference being a paying subscriber of their Substack page."

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State because the rug has just been pulled out and I am dropping into free fall. If the mainstream is insane, and the alternative scene is a sham, where does that leave me? Isn't there anyone taking responsibility for unfolding human Dignity or human Potential? Who take action to assure a bright future for human life on Earth? What if right here, right now, by asking these questions of each other, we are on the cutting edge of the evolution of human consciousness? What if we are it? What am I going to do about it? What can I do about it?"

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment together sitting in a big circle. Put the question to the Team: "Of what use is this distinction: Handsome Holy Tribal Man / Gorgeous Tantric Shakti Goddess? What do you think and feel about these ideas and questions? Do you have any experience either trying to follow one? Or trying to be one? What really happened for you? For others?" This is not intended to be a gossip slinging session. It is intended to be a Research Team.

      After 15 minutes, examine these 2 questions:

      1. What are the defining factors of a culture whose highest priority is 'safety'? (at all times you must have an enemy).
      2. What are the defining factors of a culture whose highest priority is 'thoughtware upgrades, authentic adulthood initiatory processes, building Matrix for the evolution of consciousness? (at all times the individual has Authority).

      Divide into Teams of 3 and design a regenerative adulthood-initiating culture as a Gameworld.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, skulk through your life in a parallel world, maintaining the parallel purpose of going through the required motions of that life, while at the same time, making detective notes about the design flaws of that culture, its imperatives, its faulty assumptions, its beliefs, its credos. Write and publish a short story titled something like, 'A Connecticut Yankee In King Arthur's Court', in which you personally have been grabbed from a regenerative Archan culture in the near future and dropped into modern western culture of today. Describe what you feel about your experiences and observations, and the actions you take to repair the damaged thinking and lifestyles you see everywhere around you.

      After publishing your short story, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.43 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please give the link to your short story. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #44 S.H.I.T. SAYS THE MOST IMPORTANT THING IS 'TO KNOW'. THE STANDARDS OF WHAT TO KNOW ARE GIVEN AT SCHOOL. THE SCARIEST THING IS NOT KNOWING, BECAUSE THE TEACHER COULD CALL ON YOU AT ANY MOMENT AND IF YOU DON'T KNOW THE RIGHT ANSWER, YOU LOOK BAD. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS IT IS POSSIBLE TO GO BEYOND KNOWING SO AS TO TAP INTO AND SPEAK FROM THE UNKNOWN AS AN INFINITE RESOURCE.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.44

      PART 1: Become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding the Known and the Unknown by reading and doing Experiments in the Speak From The Unknown website. With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"I used to think that the Known has more value than the Unknown. I have been afraid of being seen as someone who values the Unknown."

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State where I am becoming friends with the Unknown. Modern culture values what it knows, but the modern culture approach is exterminating life on Earth. By now I see that the Unknown is bigger than the Known, and Not Knowing is no longer forbidden territory. The Unknown is so big that I would be a fool to think I can encompass it, yet I am developing the capacity to Speak From The Unknown. I am skipping over my rehearsed statements and safe topics, and instead I Notice what is interesting, entertaining, or otherwise valuable. I am leaving behind my First Thoughts, and sometimes even my Second Thoughts. Then what comes to mind is truly alive because it was just born in that instant. It is alive because it is Improvised, ex-tempore - 'it comes from outside of time'. The Unknown is at my side as a rich resource of unexpected and unformulated Clarity and Possibility."

      Then write what you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware by sitting in a big circle where 3 people serve as Coaches. Have a 6 minute free conversation with the requirement that what can be spoken must come from internally waiting until the Unknown speaks, rather than hooking their mouth directly to their brain as in Normal Neurotic Speaking. The Coaches shout, "Beep!" and give evidence of anyone speaking from the Known. Then stop and organize into groups of 3 in chairs. One person is the Possibilitator who will practice Speaking From The Unknown. One person sits across from the Possibilitator as the Client and asks the Possibilitator questions about a theme of the Client's choice. The third person is the Coach who offers encouraging ideas to the Possibilitator, for example:

      • that the Possibilitator not say anything they have ever said before.
      • that the Possibilitator not say anything they already know about.
      • that the Possibilitator not laugh at their own startling sparkliness when the Unknown presents extraordinary jewels, because that may disconnect the Possibilitator from the Unknown and bring them back into their ordinary limited mind.

      After 12 minutes, rotate roles. After another 12 minutes, rotate roles again so each person gets to practice in all 3 roles. Then reorganize into new groups of 3 and cycle through to practice in the 3 roles again. After that, take some sharing and answer any questions (of course, from the Unknown).

      PART 4: Deliver an online or offline Workshop, doing exactly what you just did at your Possibility Team. Record your Workshop and publish the recording online. If each Participant pays €30 for the Workshop, and you have 24 participants, you bring in €720. Do this 3 times in a month and you can quit your corporate job, plus a lot of people join your Circle and learn to tap into one of the Infinite Resources which they can then use for creating Nonmaterial Value for the rest of their lives as they build out their part of Archiarchy.

      After delivering your Workshop, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.44 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please enter the link to your WorkShop video. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #45 S.H.I.T. SAYS, "THE CERTAINTIES IN LIFE ARE DEATH AND TAXES, AND YOU SHOULD TRY TO AVOID THEM." UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS DYING 3 TIMES BEFORE BREAKFAST IS THE START OF A GOOD DAY, AND, TAXES ARE A GAMEWORLD DESIGN ERROR DUE TO USING HIERARCHICAL POWER STRUCTURES WHICH PSYCHOPATHS ALWAYS SUBJUGATE BECAUSE THEY ARE BEST AT DOING WHATEVER IT TAKE TO TAKE POSITIONS OF POWER. CERTAINTIES ONLY COME FROM THE ARCHETYPAL DOMAINS WHICH HUMANS ARE DESIGNED TO EXPLORE. AN INFINITE HUMAN RESOURCE IN THE ARCHETYPAL DOMAINS IS YOUR PERSONAL SET OF BRIGHT PRINCIPLES WHICH YOU CAN DISTILL FROM YOUR LIFE.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.45

      PART 1: Become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding Archetypal forces of nature by reading and doing Experiments in the Infinite Resources and Bright Principles websites. With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"I used to feel secure that my college degree and the daily news told me everything I need to know about my resources. Now I am afraid that I hardly scratched the surface of what is available to me."

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State because I remember sensing the Archetypal Domains opening up around me for a moment, here and there, feeling in alignment with something greater than myself that was willing to become a resource if I was willing to be the Space through which it could serve humanity by doing its work in the world. I heard I can distill my set of 3 to 5 Bright Principles out of my life. I want to do this."

      Then write what you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment together. First make sure that everyone in your Team has distilled their Bright Principles out of their life. Instructions for this process are given in Chapter 8 of Clinton Callahan's book: Conscious Feelings, and also online at the Bright Principles website. It is not necessary that each person has done the final step of 'choosing that their life is about serving their Bright Principles'. Only that they feel somewhat comfortable and resonant with the set of Bright Principles they have extracted from their life experience. It helps to make sure that each person has at least one strong Sword Principle (about clarity), at least one strong Soul Principle (about feeding their Being), and at least one strong Heart Principle (about feeding their heart). A minimum set of 3 Bright Principles is sufficient. A working example is: Clarity. Possibility. Love. (These are also the Bright Principles of the Possibility Management gameworld.) Then organize into Groups of 4, with three Possibilitators sitting and facing a Chosen one. The Chosen one stands up facing the Possibilitators and for the next 7 minutes does Possibility Speaking while trying to allow one at a time their Bright Principles speak through them. It can help if the Possibilitators ask Authentic personal questions, or if the Chosen One lets the Bright Principles speak personally to one or the other of the Possibilitators. After the 7 minutes, rotate around in the chairs so the next Chosen one can practice speaking as their Bright Principles in action. When all 4 have had a chance to be the Chosen One, form new groups of 4 and practice again.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, three times each day, let your Bright Principles speak through you to do their work in the world. This may be by asking people specific Possibility questions so they can think about things they never thought about before, or think about things in new ways, or responding Archetypally to other people's questions. Your Bright Principles may also generate startlingly useful Proposals for your Team or gameworld. Then, one day, sit at your writing desk, choose a question that is relevant to you and your life, your future, or your healing and transformational Path, and let your own Bright Principles write to you. Write and write without thinking much. Remember, the Bright Principles are an Infinite Resource. They do not get tired or go away. Share your download as an article.

      After publishing your Article, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.45 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please give the link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #46 S.H.I.T. SAYS YOU SHOULD CHOOSE A CAREER PATH THAT PROMISES YOU THE MOST FINANCIAL STABILITY AND SOCIALLY UPWARD MOBILITY. UPDATED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS YOU WERE BORN TO PROVIDE CERTAIN SERVICES FROM YOUR ARCHETYPAL LINEAGE TO YOUR VILLAGE, BUT STRONG AND CLEAR INITIATORY PREPARATIONS ARE REQUIRED BEFORE YOU ARE READY TO JACK-IN TO YOUR ARCHETYPAL LINEAGE.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.46

      PART 1: With the other members of your Possibility Team, become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding your Archetypal Lineage while you study and do the Experiments together on the Archetypal Lineage and 4 Lineages websites.

      With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other, "I always knew there was something bigger waiting for me but nobody ever told me what it was."

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State because I am discovering that everyone has an Archetypal Lineage... but none exactly like mine. There are 4 categories of Archetypal Lineages. My Archetypal Lineage fits into one of these categories, or it may have resonance with more than one category. My Archetypal Lineage is waiting to stream down into my life, entering from up behind the top of my spine and exiting into my life actions through the place just above my heart. My Archetypal Lineage is already ready to put useful and challenging jobs on my bench, and also to provide me with unseen resources and unimaginable coincidences and connections to handle these jobs. My Box has been running like hell away from these jobs... but my Being is starving for the challenge and the adventure the jobs will bring. I could be living as the space through which my Archetypal Lineage does its work in the world. Its services would benefit my village. My Archetypal Lineage has no hands or mouth, so it cannot do its work in the material world without me. I want to prepare to jack-in to my Archetypal Lineage."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment together. Sit in Teams of 4, with 3 Possibilitators facing a Chosen One. The Chosen One gives their Beep! Book to one of the Possibilitators who takes notes about what is said. The Possibilitator Team's job is to describe and define as clearly as they can what they sense as the Chosen One's Archetypal Lineage. Hints come from how they serve the Village, what their Knacks are, the kinds of Spaces they Cavitate and Navigate, the kinds of Processes they are best at delivering, their overall Purpose in life, which of the 4 Lineages it is, what they are trying to Create, what their Conscious Gremlin has talents for, what feeds their Being and feeds their Heart while they feed the Village, the kinds of Legends everyone knows about them, what turns them on to create that makes a difference in the world. When asked, the Chosen One provides anecdotes, and answers questions. Their Archetypal Lineage is already manifested in their life. It is often easier for others to see your Archetypal Lineage than it is for you to see it. After 13 minutes, the Team of Possibilitators stops and distills their notes into a unique descriptive phrase that captures the essence and Names the Archetypal Lineage. Then rotate positions and go again, until all 4 have written the working-draft name of their Archetypal Lineage on the inside cover of their Beep! Book as: "I am a _____________."

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, bring life to your Archetypal Lineage. Wear an article of clothing to signify your Archetypal Lineage. Let yourself play around with accents, vocabulary, speech patterns, and behaviors of your Archetypal Lineage. Ask earnest questions of both individuals and groups you interact with so that the desires of your Archetypal Lineage are met. Let your Archetypal Lineage speak through you to respond and interact with others. One day, let your Archetypal Lineage write an article either to your Village or to the world at large from its perspectives. What does it see? Even if that is painful. What does it offer as Possibilities, or Quest-Ions? Publish the article with the byline: "Written by a _________," filling in the blank with the name of your Archetypal Lineage.

      After publishing your Article, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.46 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please enter the link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #47 S.H.I.T. SAYS MEETINGS FOLLOW PARLIAMENTARY PROCEEDURE WHERE EMPLOYEE/SLAVES OBEY A HIERARCHICAL LEADER. UPDATED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS USING THE TERM 'LEADER' FORCES YOU TO ALSO USE THE TERM 'FOLLOWER', WHICH TRANSLATES AS, 'SLAVE'. SCHOOL TRIES TO SUPPRESS HUMAN POTENTIAL AND SQUEEZE PEOPLE INTO BEING SLAVE ZOMBIES. IN ARCHIARCHY, GROUPS ORGANIZE IN CIRCLES USING TORUS MEETING TECHNOLOGIES WHICH LIBERATE THE GENIUS IN EACH PERSON TO PLAY FULL OUT IN ENDLESS COLLABORATIVE CREATION.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.47

      NOTE TO POSSIBILITY TEAM SPACEHOLDER: This Experiment requires preparation, namely, that you make Purple Cards for everyone who will come to your meeting. We recommend making extras to carry around and use in your other meeting spaces. A Purple Card is a device used in Torus Technology meetings. Complete explanation for what Purple Cards are, how to use them, and how to make them are given on the Purple Card website: purplecard.mystrikingly.com.

      PART 1: Become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding organizations, governments, churches, universities, corporations, and other modern culture gameworld meetings while you study and do the Experiments together on the Hierarchy and Torus Technology websites. With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"I used to think there was either democracy, which is good, or communism, which is bad. I used to think that voting empowered the people in a representative government which followed a constitution and a bill of rights."

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State because nobody I voted for ever got elected. Or if they did win, they betrayed what they promised me, starting on day one. Through Torus Meeting Technology I am empowered with simple ways for human beings to meet in a local-authority circle where no bullying narcissist or emotionally reactive colleague can take over, where intelligent resistance is consulted, and where wild Proposal liberate group genius. Torus Technology is a powerful way for many to also become one."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment. Sit in a big circle, pass out Purple Cards to each person, and have a decision-making or plan-making meeting. For example, act as if the participants of your Possibility Team are the Infinity Ring of an Archiarchy Invention Center (AIC). Select the first Spaceholder, Documenter, and Time Keeper. Start by making sure that everyone is in First Position with their Sword Of Clarity to hand, and that people's Gremlins are on a short leash at their side. Then use the tools and techniques given on the Torus Technology website, including Red Cloth, Purple Card, Proposals, Frying Pan, Resistance Decision Making, Conscious Feelings, Feelings Form, Poop On The Table, Weapons On The Table, Become Unhookable, Divergence and Convergence. Your objective is to deepen and clarify the Radical Responsibility Context of your Archiarchy Invention Center gameworld by checking on the Rules of Engagement in your Codex. If no Codex exists, create it. Consider the Possibility of making this Archiarchy Invention Center (AIC) the center of your life.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, Notice wherever Torus Meeting Technology could be used and is still unknown. Every time you find a possible place of application, use it, or speak out and Propose that Torus Technology be used, explaining the benefits and easefulness that you discovered during your Possibility Team. As people struggle to understand what you are Proposing, write down their confusions or excuses defending the status quo. Once you have 3 excuses or confusions, write and publish an Article that reports those objections and meets them head on - puts the Poop On The Table - and clarifies what else is Possible using Torus Technology.

      After publishing your Article, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.47 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please give the link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #48 S.H.I.T. SAYS REALITY IS ON THE NEWS. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS THE 'NEWS' IS POLITICAL PROPAGANDA GENERATED BY WAR-PROFITING CORPORATIONS. REALITY IS UNRELENTINGLY AT YOUR FEET. LIFE HAPPENS THROUGH LEARNING TO CREATE POSSIBILITY FOR INVENTING NEW GAMEWORLDS IN REGENERATIVE HUMAN CULTURES THAT SUPPORT A FUTURE FOR LIFE ON EARTH. ANYTHING OTHER THAN THIS IS OMNICIDAL GREMLIN SHIT.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.48

      PART 1: Become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding what reality is while you study and do the Experiments together on the Story World, Hit Bottom, and Radical Reality websites. With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"I used to think that civilization was based on reality. I thought the politics was real, the economics and the need to have money to live was real, the technical infrastructure was real, the news about war was real..."

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State because now it all seems to be manufactured Bullshit, serving Gremlin Purposes. It is a world created and run by unbalanced, short sighted, greedy, crippled, heartless, insanely psychopathic Gremlins. Yes, some people are fighting against them to try to create a better world, but the fighters downplay how setting new Context is the first step of creating a new gameworld. Buckminster Fuller said, 'You don't change things by fighting against the existing gameworlds. You change things by creating and inhabiting newly contexted gameworlds that make the existing gameworlds irrelevant. The existing gameworlds are already obsolete.' I want to live with other people in regenerative local-authority radically-responsible gameworlds of our own making."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment. Organize into Teams of 4 sitting in chairs with one Chosen One facing 3 Possibilitators. The Chosen One gives their Beep! Book to one of the Possibilitators to take notes about what the Chosen One can work on to become more centered and grounded and effective in Radical Reality. Begin each time by reading these notes from the Radical Reality website:

      Radical Reality is Reality as it is, without any Stories attached.

      But Human Beings are Story Makers.

      We do not relate to the world as it is.

      We relate to the world through our Stories of the world.

      Most of our Stories have come from other people, and therefore, from the past.

      This means we can generally only duplicate what they have done and create what has already been created.

      However, what has already been created places no limitations on what can Possibly be created.

      The more accurately your thoughtware approaches Reality, the more Agency you have to create valuable results in Reality.

      Thoughtmaps are neither true nor false, neither right nor wrong, neither good nor bad. Instead, thoughtmaps are either accurate or inaccurate. The more accurate your thoughtmaps, the more you can create in Radical Reality.

      Then the 3 Possibilitators interview the Chosen One about themselves and their life. The Possibilitators ask questions such as, "Tell us about yourself. Who are you? What are you trying to create? What do you value about your mission? How is it going so far? What is in the way of better results?" For the first 7 minutes they are taking extensive notes about where the Chosen One is with regards to Reality. After the first 7 minutes of notetaking, the Possibilitators mirror back to the Chosen One what they are Noticing and ask the Chosen One to explain why they would set their life up like this, the value of it, the Results they are trying to create, all the while making additional notes about what sort of Experiments the Chosen One might want to do to acquire a more tenacious grip and more intimate relationship with Radical Reality. After the 14 minutes of interview, rotate to new chairs so a new Chosen One can be interviewed. Continue until all 4 have had a chance to be the Chosen One. At the end, take turns reading your notes out loud to make sure you can read the words, and understand them, and apply them in your daily life as extraordinary new Experiments to try.
