Before going home, arrange to have a 3Cell for the next week or two to support each other in doing your Experiments in Hitting Bottom and exploring Radical Responsibility.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, do the Experiments you received in your Possibility Team. Do them slowly and thoroughly, not so that you can understand what you are doing and what the outcome might be, but rather so that you build new Matrix at The Bottom. Be sure to stay in close touch with your 3Cell, either with in-person meetings or multiple calls during the week. Be sure to do any Emotional Healing Processes (EHP) that arise. Collect your Self Observations into an Article titled something like, 'Observations of a Bottom Dweller'. Publish your Article.

      After publishing your Article, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.48 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please give the link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #49 S.H.I.T. SAYS MEN ARE BETTER THAN WOMEN, MEN OWN WOMEN, WOMEN SHOULD OBEY AND SERVE THE MAN, AND THEN EVERYTHING WILL WORK OUT FOR THE BEST. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS RELATING HAPPENS BEYOND THE EDGES OF PATRIARCHY. ARCHAN RELATING OPERATES FROM AN ENTIRELY NEW CONTEXT FOR HUMAN INTIMACY. IF YOU THINK RELATIONSHIPS SUCK, YOU ARE RIGHT, BECAUSE YOUR RELATIONSHIP IS GETTING IN THE WAY OF YOUR RELATING.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.49

      PART 1: Become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding relating and intimacy while you study and do the Experiments together on the Intimacy, Evolution Of Relating, Radical Relating, and Archan Relating websites. With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"I used to think I understood relating, getting a partner, having sex... I thought I knew how it goes... I thought that is all there is..."

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State because Radical Relating could be my deepest longing, yet no one has shown me how to do it. New skills are required. These skills are being developed in Archiarchy, next culture - the culture naturally emerging now that Matriarchy and Patriarchy have run their course. So many pre-existing conditions interfere with my attempts at Radical Relating. For example, I am terrified of becoming Present, and scared to death of connecting Being to Being. I am so afraid of being truly seen. I have unhealed childhood wounds, with Projections and Expectations. My Gremlin wants to undermine Intimacy with Reactivity and Low Drama to keep me in my familiar isolation. All these challenges are worth intelligently engaging... because Radical Relating is possible, and it could be excellent..."

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment. Organize into Teams of 3 sitting in chairs, with the Possibilitator sitting across from the Client, and the Coach sitting to the side of the Possibilitator. The Possibilitator's challenge is to do Archan Relating with the Client, who can either be themselves, or can role play someone the Possibilitator asks them to shift into to Practice Archan Relating. Possibilitator gives their Beep! Book to the Coach. Both the Coach and the Client can give Feedback and Coaching to the Possibilitator. Remember:

      • FEEDBACK is about the past (what just happened), what worked about it, and what did not work about it.
      • COACHING is about the future, about what the Possibilitator could try next time to create better Results.

      After each Feedback and Coaching, the Coach tells the Possibilitator, "Shift! Go!" The Feedback and Coaching should include Archan Relating distinctions such as:

      1. Become Present
      2. First Position
      3. Experiential Reality
      4. Conscious Feelings
      5. Feelings Form
      6. 5 Body Check-In
      7. Listenings
      8. Speakings
      9. 2 Dramas
      10. Egostates
      11. Gremlin
      12. Map Of Possibility
      13. Minimize NOW
      14. Box Technology
      15. Box Is Optional
      16. Reactivity
      17. Parts
      18. Survival Strategy
      19. Real Voice
      20. Make Boundaries
      21. Creative Collaboration
      22. Say What You Want
      23. Proposals
      24. Fantasy World
      25. Story World
      26. Poop On The Table
      27. Weapons On The Table
      28. Adulthood
      29. Assumptions+Expectations+Resentment+Revenge
      30. Radical Honesty
      31. Radical Relating
      32. Radical Reality
      33. Archetypal Domains
      34. Archiamory

      Go for 13 minutes while the Coach makes prolific, sparklingly clear notes in the Possibilitator's Beep! Book. Then rotate positions in the chairs and go again, until everyone in the Team has had a chance to try each of the 3 roles. Then change Teams and go again through all 3 rounds of Practicing Archan Relating. At the end, each person review the notes in your Beep! Book and formulate 3 specific Practices and 2 specific Emotional Healing Processes (EHP) to focus on this week. Read them out loud to inspire others.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, never stop Practicing Archan Relating. You won't get it at first. Forget that. There are too many subtle Experiential details to bring together in Archan Relating. Like learning to ride a bike, you will try and crash and try and crash and try and crash... until for a moment, you will get it. For a moment you will be Flying in Yellow Stuff, impersonal Archetypal Love. And then you will crash... Each time you crash it is not a failure and it is not a problem. Simply do the best you can to document what made you crash - ask for Feedback and Coaching about the details from witnesses - then Shift! your behavior and try again. Keep Experimenting everywhere you go, with everyone you meet. If you get repeatedly the same Feedback, it means you did not Shift! Make detailed notes in your Beep! Book, then write and publish an Article titled something like, 'Mini-Handbook For Archan Relating'.

      After publishing your Article, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.49 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please give the link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #50 S.H.I.T. SAYS A HUMAN CONSTITUTION IS THE LEGAL STRUCTURE FOR HUMANITY TO THRIVE. UPDATED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS HUMANITY IS THRIVING... LIKE BACTERIA, OVERPOPULATING AND DYING IN ITS OWN TOXIC WASTES. ARCHANS ADOPT AN UPGRADED UNDERSTANDING THROUGH A GAIAN CONSTITUTION THAT INCLUDES BOUNTY HUNTERS AND GAMEWORLD DEMOLISHERS WHO BRING A SWIFT DEATH SENTENCE TO CORPORATIONS, GOVERNMENTS, AND RELIGIONS WHO OVERSTEP THE BILL OF WRONGS.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.50

      PART 1: Become acutely aware of your Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) regarding the rule of law of western civilization while you study and do the Experiments together on the What Now, Patriarchy, Psychopath, Archan Law, and Nanonations websites. With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"I used to think that the constitution was written by the smartest people on the planet, that it was foolproof, that current mega-governments would steward humanity into a bright future for life on Earth..."

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State because I see how mega-governments are systemmatically hijacked by the psychopathic agenda. It is up to me to take back my own Authority. It is up to me and my Team to Relocalize... EVERYTHING! Now that I have these Thoughtware Upgrades, tools, thoughtmaps, and processes, I am no longer a Victim. I have access to Infinite Resources, both inside of me and outside of me. I can build new gameworlds. I can creatively-collaborate with Teams. I can StartOver!"

      Then write whatever you just said into your Beep! Book.

      PART 3: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware in your Possibility Team by doing the following Experiment. Organize into Teams of 3 sitting in chairs, with the Possibilitator sitting across from the Client, and the Coach sitting to the side of the Possibilitator. The Possibilitator's challenge is to explain Archan Law to the Client. The Client can ask questions, but should not take on the Gremlin role. Simply be interested in the Possibilities being offered by the Possibilitator. The Coach coaches the Possibilitator regarding the quality of their presentation to the Client. Coaching might include reference to the following:

      1. First Position
      2. Cavitating Space
      3. Holding Space
      4. Setting Context
      5. Navigating Space
      6. Bright Principles
      7. Sword Of Clarity
      8. Inner Structure
      9. Memetics
      10. Memetic Constructs
      11. Memectomy
      12. Memetic Speaking

      After 13 minutes, rotate positions and repeat until all members of the Team have gotten to play in all 3 roles.

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, walk through the world as if it is your world and you are a Guardian of Archan Law. Write infractions of Archan Law in your Beep! Book. If you feel courageous enough, after 3 days of infraction writing, take your Beep! Book to the town council and report on your findings. Which city laws are illegal. Which corporations and organizations are illegal and causing damage according to Archan Law. Ask the town council to show you its Energy Descent Plan now that Peak Oil is past and we have far exceeded the allowable 350 ppm atmospheric CO2 that would assure a stable and liveable climate on Earth. Please remember the THIRD RULE: Do not get arrested. Write your list of infractions and the consequences of each into an Article. Publish the Article with the title something like: '13 Infractions Of Archan Law In Our Town'.

      After publishing your Article, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.50 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please give a link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #51 S.H.I.T. SAYS, "WHAT YOU SEE IS WHAT YOU GET!" AND THEN DOES EVERYTHING IT CAN TO LIMIT WHAT YOU SEE. UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS WHAT YOU SEE IS FORMED BY THE STRUCTURE OF YOUR SURVIVAL STRATEGY BOX. BY TAKING YOUR BOX INTO BREAKDOWN (OR TAKING YOUR GAMEWORLD CONTEXT INTO BREAKDOWN BY FINALLY PUTTING THE POOP ON THE TABLE...) YOU ENTER A LIQUID STATE IN WHICH YOUR BOX (OR YOUR GAMEWORLD...) CAN REORDER - OR BECOME OPTIONAL - AND YOUR BEING CAN STEP DIRECTLY INTO THE WORLD AND START OVER. YES, THIS INCLUDES ENTERING GROUNDLESSNESS, WHERE REALITY LIVES, AND WHERE YOU FACE INESTIMABLE FREEDOMS OF MOVEMENT. FORTUNATELY, IT DOES NOT TAKE LONG TO DISCOVER THAT HUMAN BEINGS ARE DESIGNED TO FLY.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.51

      POSSIBILITY TEAM SPACEHOLDER NOTE: To proceed with this Possibility Team you will need to arrange that each Team of 3 participants has one box of tissues, one plastic barf bucket, and one Red Hand Towel (which, of course, need not be colored red...)

      PART 1: By now you have a glimpsed the immensity of the Treasure of Archan Thoughtware Ugrades freely pouring through Possibilitators into the world. The above 50 Thoughtware Upgrades are only a small fraction of the 700+ websites presently online at the StartOver.xyz Spaceport. Together these websites form a valuable interconnected cloud of Clarity and Possibility which has been neglected by Modern Culture educational services.

      How far can you go?

      The actual question at hand is, how far will you go?

      Starting over does not mean to repeat what you have already explored. By Upgrading your Thoughtware, you become a new person. You are not the same 'you' who began this year-long adventure. The next adventures are new. They begin where you are now.

      Once you experience the transformation of an Authentic Adulthood Initiatory Process, you are capable of providing that Initiation for others. This is an entirely new challenge, to Cavitate, Hold, and Navigate Transformational Spaces for others as part of the Nonmaterial Value you provide. One Archan profession for this is called Possibility Coaching. To prepare yourselves, study and do the Experiments together on the Possibility Coaching and Create Possibility websites, especially studying the 140+ example videos. With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"I used to think that a college degree in psychology was required before I could Hold Space for someone in an Emotional Healing Process. But, come to think of it, most modern coaching modalities treat Feelings and Emotions as the problem rather than the solution to the problem. Most therapists are themselves unable to Consciously Feel..."

      PART 2: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State because I am sure that I am not qualified to Hold Space for a Box Expanding Emotional Healing Process (EHP). I am not smart enough. I am not good enough. I will never make it. I might make a mistake. People won't trust me. I am not trustworthy enough. I don't have the training. I am not certified. I don't have the skills. Anne-Chloé can do it better than me..." etc. Open your Beep! Book and write down all your Stories, Justifications, Reasons, and Excuses for not being able to Navigate a Liquid State in which someone else can transform. Be relentlessly clear and specific while you write down all these Voices. This is the stuff that you have been believing to be true about yourself. After 7 minutes of listing your excuses, read what you wrote out loud to each other in your Possibility Team. Then all pull out your Voice Blasters and shoot those Voices until they are gone.

      PART 3: Move into Teams of 3 in chairs with one person the Possibilitator who sits facing the Client. The Coach sits to the side of the Possibilitator. Your Team's Possibility Coaching tools rest on the floor near the Client's chair: bucket, towel, and tissues. The Client hands their Beep! Book to the Coach. The Possibilitator makes sure that they and the Client are in First Position (Centered, Grounded, Bubbled, Sword Out, with a Minimized NOW, ready to be in Awe and Improvise) then clicks their Clicker one more time to make a grounded Golden Cube Of Work Space around all 3 of you. Then the Possibilitator offers their hand to the Client while saying, "Welcome to my Possibility Coaching office. What can I do for you?" For the next 30 minutes, use your Upgraded Thoughtwre to Navigate an Emotional Healing Process (EHP) for your Client. Be sure to wrap it up at the end by writing down their Old Decisions and any New Decisions they make during the Process in their Beep! Book, and also giving them one or two Practices to do to build Matix for their new ways of being. After this, rotate roles and repeat until everyone has had a chance to Hold Space for and Navigate and Coach an Emotional Healing Process (EHP).

      PART 4: For the next 7 days, walk through the world holding a specific Quest-Ion in your Center, something like: "In what ways is modern culture making efforts to prevent me from questioning the Thoughtware I am using? In what ways is modern culture trying to distract me from Upgrading my Thoughtware? What are the biggest rewards modern culture offers me to abandon my Authority and stay in the roles they provide?" As you walk and Observe, keep asking yourself, "What is my personal Quest? What is my real mission?" Look through your Beep! Book notes from the past year - especially the notes that excite you the most - and extract a statement of your Quest. Write and publish an overview Article to report the trials and tribulations, successes and expansions from your past year Experimenting together with your Possibility Team, titled something like: '13 Things I Discovered With A Team Of Edgeworkers'.

      For extra credit we offer you this central Thoughtware Upgrade challenge: Organize a special 3Cell Team to earn and register 1,000 Matrix Points each through Experimenting together in the StartOver.xyz gameworld. Why? Because when you upgrade your own Thoughtware, you are upgrading Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware.

      After publishing your Article, please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.51 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please give a link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

      #52 S.H.I.T. SAYS, "SOME THINGS ARE POSSIBLE AND SOME THINGS ARE NOT, ESPECIALLY THOSE THINGS THAT MIGHT UPSET THE ECONOMY." UPGRADED ARCHAN THOUGHTWARE SAYS POSSIBILITY IS AN ARCHETYPAL FORCE OF NATURE THAT ORIGINATES AS A PROBABILITY FIELD. POSSIBILITY CAN BE CREATED IF THERE IS NOT ENOUGH, AND DESTROYED IF THERE IS TOO MUCH. IT IS TIME FOR YOU TO GIVE A WORKTALK ABOUT HOW TO CREATE POSSIBILITY.

      Matrix Code 50THOUGH.52

      NOTE FOR POSSIBILITY TEAM SPACEHOLDER: This Thoughtware Upgrade Experiment helps prepare your Team members to deliver a WorkTalk on the theme of: 'How To Create Possibility'. The suggestion is to rotate Spaceholder every 10 minutes during the possibility Team meeting, giving whoever is Spaceholder live Feedback and Coaching as the Possibility Team proceeds. Yes, this can seem chaotic. Let the chaos be boisterous and Fun.

      PART 1: SPACEHOLDER SETS CONTEXT BY SAYING: Become acutely aware of the ways that Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.) prohibits Possibility as we read together the daily news articles on a popular news platform. Now let's study and do the Experiments together on the Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware, and Possibility websites. With your new Clarity, take turns in pairs explaining to each other,"I always thought of 'possibility' as a vague concept proposing that something might be possible in the current circumstances, a concept to think about, a concept to judge and criticize, perhaps even to ridicule and make jokes about..."

      PART 2: SPACEHOLDER GIVES THE SECOND EXERCISE: Take turns saying something like, "Now I am going through a Thoughtware Upgrade Liquid State because now I see Possibility as 'the measurable number of real options that a person or Team has to choose from'. So often there is too much Possibility, so some must be destroyed. Or if there is not enough Possibility, more Possibility can be created. The forces that diminish or block Possibility are the Assumptions, Conclusions, Stories, Beliefs, Excuses, or Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware that are components of a person's Box and Survival Strategy, combined with their Emotional Reactivity, Mind Machines, Brain Splits, Constellations, Egostate Contaminations, Unconscious Gremlin Purposes, or Unconscious Fears. Creating or destroying Possibility includes human transformation and Adulthood Initiations that build new Matrix that allow a person to make new Distinctions and source more resources by applying their own Infinite Resources. So much more is Possible now that I interact with Possibility as an Archetypal Force of Nature which is my ally, rather than as a mere concept."

      Ask the people to write whatever they just said into their Beep! Book.

      PART 3: SPACEHOLDER GIVES THE SECOND EXERCISE: Test the value of your Upgraded Thoughtware by doing the following Possibility Creation Experiment. Organize into Teams of 3 sitting in chairs with a Possibilitator sitting directly across from a Client, and with a Coach at the side of the Possibilitator. Have a box of tissues, a Rage towel, and a barf bucket near the Client. The Client gives their Beep! Book to the Coach for making notes. The Possibilitator checks that everyone is in First Position, then clicks their Clicker one more time to create a grounded Golden Cube of Workspace, in particular, calling their own set of Bright Principles into that Space. Then the Possibilitator asks, "What sort of Possibility would you like today?" The Client makes a clear request, and the Possibilitator Navigates the needed Transformational Processes so the new Possibility can occur. Wrap up by giving the Client recommended Possibility Books to read and Possibility Films to watch, and specific new behaviors to Practice. Then shift roles and continue until everyone in the Team has had a chance to be Client, Possibilitator, and Coach.

      PART 4: During the next 7 days, give a WorkTalk either online or in person titled something like: 'How To Create Possibility'. Charge the equivalent of €15 per person to participate. Be sure to tell people when they arrive that this is not simply a Talk, but a WorkTalk, which is a Space in which they may feel Conscious Feelings and go through an evolutionary Liquid State Process. Make sure they agree with this, or give them their money back and invite them to leave the Space. Make sure you record this meeting for future reference, and publish the recording on your Website. Establish the WorkTalk Context that is given as part of this Possibility Team meeting as described above, making plenty of time to explain the various ways Human Beings block Possibility in their daily lives and relationships. Be sure to make time where people can ask questions where you answer by Speaking From The Unknown. Then divide people into teams of 3, setting up the Possibilitator, Client, and Coach roles. Invite the Client to ask for specific Possibility, and for the Possibilitator and Coach to create it for them. People have a huge secret longing to leave the competitive Win-Lose games of modern culture behind and to instead Creatively Collaborate with each other to Create an abundance of wonderful new Possibility. Make sure the Client writes down the Possibilities they are given in their Beep! Book or their Box and Gremlin will make them forget the new Possibilities within minutes to protect their status quo. Afterwards, write and publish an Article about what you learned by giving a WorkTalk about how people can learn to create Possibility for other people or for Teams. Title your Article something like, 'Possibility Ain't What You Think It Is'.

      After publishing your Article please record Matrix Code 50THOUGH.52 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF field, please give a link to your Article. This Experiment is worth 7 Matrix Points.

    • Welcome to Archiarchy !

    • Distinctionary

      Thinking new thoughts often involves learning new words.

      On the one hand, jargon is a pain in the ass.

      On the other hand, clarity is Gold.

      We choose the Gold.

      Hoping it will be useful to you, we created a 'Distinctionary' of Archan terminology.

      The Distinctionary is an alphabetical listing of the Distinctions that form the skeleton of Archan Thoughtware.

      Distinctionary entries include links to related websites in the StartOver.xyz platform, offering you deeper explanations of the new Thoughtware, and powerful everyday-life Experiments to try for practicing your new skills.

      DISTINCTIONARY

    • SpacePort = YouPort

      The StartOver.xyz SpacePort is a platform for launching you into your next Thoughtware Upgrade adventures!

      Simply page down at SpacePort to find an alphabetical list of 700+ StartOver.xyz websites, each one packed with powerful new Thoughtware and Matrix-Building Experiments for you to try.

      Doing the Experiments builds authentic Matrix in your Being that expands your awareness and amplifies your agency.

      Be sure to record the Matrix Points you earn from each Experiment that you do in your free account at StartOver.xyz.

      Thank you for thinking wildly!

      SPACEPORT

    • S.P.A.R.K.s

      S.P.A.R.K. stands for Specific Practical Applications of Radical Knowledge.

      Download any S.P.A.R.K. you want for free.

      S.P.A.R.K.s are copyleft open-code thoughtware-upgrades, written by Clinton Callahan for the Creative Commons (CC BY SA 4.0 International License).

      You can share S.P.A.R.K.s with your whole Circle of friends.

      Experimenting with one S.P.A.R.K. per week is perfect timing.

      For High Level Fun practice the exercises together during your weekly S.P.A.R.K. Study Group or your Possibility Team meetings!

      There are already 260 S.P.A.R.K.s written in English, enough for one each week for 5 years in your Possibility Team!

      What a Treasure you have found!

      A Treasure of Transformation!

      S.P.A.R.K.s

    • S.T.A.R.R.s

      S.T.A.R.R. stands for Startling Tales About Radical Responsibility.

      This website shares video snippets of our lives with you. Not just any snippet... but those startling moments when we try to apply Radical Responsibility.

      Sometimes it works. Sometimes it doesn't work. That's why we think of these as 'Experiments'. We are Experimenters.

      We are not trying to present you with polished methods. There aren't any. We are sharing our discoveries with you along our experiential journey.

      Each video is a window into a precious moment. So many precious moments already passed before we figured out that we could share our High Level Fun with you so that you could try it yourself.

      S.T.A.R.R.s

    • StartOver.xyz

      NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-play massively-multiplayer online-and-offline thoughtware-upgrade matrix-building personal-transformation real-life adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code 50THOUGH.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!

      Cookie Use
      We use cookies to ensure a smooth browsing experience. By accepting, you agree the use of cookies. Learn More

      ×
      What Are Cookies?

      Cookies are bits of information (memory files) stored in your browser by sites you visit. As is common practice with almost all websites, this site uses cookie to improve your experience by remembering your preferences and enable other cookie-based features (e.g. analytics).

      Our Cookies

      When you submit data through a form such as those found on contact pages or comment forms, cookies may be set to remember your user details for future correspondence.

      In order to provide you with a better experience and remember your preferences, we need to set cookies so that this information can be called whenever you interact with a page.

      Third-Party cookies

      In special cases, we also use cookies provided by trusted third parties like Google Analytics. Third party analytics are used to track and measure usage of this site so that we can continue to produce engaging content.

      How To Disable Cookies?

      Most browsers let you to refuse to accept cookies. See your browser Help or Tool for how to do this. Be aware that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of this and many other websites you visit. Therefore, it is recommended that you do not disable cookies.

      Cookie Use
